title: Start
body:
Frances Cheng: Phew! Here we are!
Frances Cheng: See those capsules over there?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭) >>
Frances Cheng: Those are Vision Shuttles. Normally we take those to and from work.
<<Set($DLState,蕭勇明開始小跑向剛下公車的兩人)>>
Michael Hsiao: Hi, Frances!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭返回) >>
Michael Hsiao: Morning!
Thought: Heeey, who the heck is this guy?
Michael Hsiao: Oh, wait. That's not right.
Michael Hsiao: It's evening already.
Michael Hsiao: Let's start over. Good evening! Working night shift?;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_抬手) >>
Frances Cheng: Evening.
Thought: He's calling Fran by her first name?;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_抬手返回) >>
Frances Cheng: No, it's just that I have some unfinished work.
Michael Hsiao: I see. Thought you'd be taking one of them capsules.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰) >>
Frances Cheng: I would if I could. The transit station near my place is closed for maintenance.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰抬手) >>
Michael Hsiao: Which station would that be?
Thought: Why do you care so much, nosy dude?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰抬手返回) >>
Thought: Fran doesn't like people asking about private matters.
Michael Hsiao: Is it super far away?
 
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Dingan station.;<<Set ($PersonalDataIssue,$+1)>>;<<Set($ToldYunMinHomeMRT,0)>>
    Michael Hsiao: Ah, that's kind of close.
    Frances Cheng: Y-yeah. 
    <<#GoTo(@主動報老家位置以後)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: It's, um, around Yonghe District.
Michael Hsiao: Ha, I see.
<< @主動報老家位置以後 >>
Michael Hsiao: And this gentleman is...?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Jason Dai, new employee.
    Michael Hsiao: Nice to meet you! I'm—
    <<@蕭勇明自我介紹>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Michael Hsiao, is it?
        Michael Hsiao: ...!?
        Frances Cheng: How did you know? Have you met before?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭) >>
        Thought: I'm positive that we have never met...;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_思考) >>
        Thought: Somehow his name just popped up in my head.
        Michael Hsiao: Um...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭返回) >>;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_思考返回) >>
        Michael Hsiao: Have we met before?;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_抬手) >>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Nah, it's a lucky guess.
            Michael Hsiao: Huh?;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_抬手返回) >>
            Michael Hsiao: That's some… serious luck.
            Frances Cheng: Stop it, J! This is not funny.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭) >>
            Frances Cheng: You guys must have met somewhere before, right?
            Michael Hsiao: R-right! We must have.;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_比七) >>
            Michael Hsiao: I don't remember when or where, but that must be it!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭返回) >>
            Michael Hsiao: Terribly sorry, Mr. Dai. Memory isn't my strongest suit.;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_比七返回) >>;<<Set($HowToIntroduceYourself,2)>>; 
            Michael Hsiao: Let's pretend we're meeting for the first time, shall we?
            //猜到的，像是主角在搞笑
        ->We've met a long time ago.
            Michael Hsiao: R-really?;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_抬手返回) >>
            Michael Hsiao: Terribly sorry. I don't remember anything about it...
            Frances Cheng: Don't be. He's not exactly the kind of super memorable guy!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭) >>
            <<#Simple(6)>>
            ->Oi!
                Frances Cheng: Haha, easy, easy!
                Frances Cheng: I'm joking.
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Michael Hsiao: No, this is totally my bad.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭返回) >>
            Michael Hsiao: Promise I won't forget again next time.
            Michael Hsiao: Let's pretend we're meeting for the first time, shall we?; <<Set($HowToIntroduceYourself,2)>>; //很巧居然以前見過，程芳還開玩笑。
            <<#GoTo(@很高興認識主角)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Michael Hsiao: I'm Michael.
    Michael Hsiao: Michael Hsiao.; <<Set($HowToIntroduceYourself,0)>>
    <<@很高興認識主角>>
    Michael Hsiao: Nice to meet you, Mr. Dai.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Nice to meet you, too.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->I'm her boyfriend.;<<Set ($PersonalDataIssue,$PersonalDataIssue+2)>>;<<Set($ToldYunMinFangIsGF,0)>>
    Thought: Huh? Why did I say that?
    Thought: Fran specifically asked me not to...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭) >>
    Michael Hsiao: I see...
    Michael Hsiao: I didn't know Frances is dating...;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_比七) >>
    Thought: Well, now you know.
    Frances Cheng: What are you talking about? Haha.;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_比七返回) >>;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭返回) >>
    Frances Cheng: He's just pulling your leg.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站抬手) >>
    Frances Cheng: We are friends, but not that kind. Yeah.
    Thought: Fran...;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_思考) >>;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站抬手返回) >>
    Michael Hsiao: Friends, huh...
    Michael Hsiao: Would you introduce...?
    Frances Cheng: Sorry, this is Mr. Dai.
    Michael Hsiao: You're funny, Mr. Dai, haha...
    Michael Hsiao: Nice to meet you. I'm...;<< Play (蕭勇明, MBU_蕭勇明_思考返回) >>
    <<#GoTo(@蕭勇明自我介紹)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
 
 
Michael Hsiao: ...I'm on patrol duty, actually. I'd better be going.
Michael Hsiao: Have a nice evening and see you around.
Frances Cheng: Goodbye.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Goodbye.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Set($DLState,蕭勇明開始小跑離開剛下公車的兩人)>>
 
Frances Cheng: ...
Frances Cheng: ...
<<Set($DLState,程芳開始月台心得)>>
Frances Cheng: ...
<<PlayUntil(程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_轉身)>>
 
<<#If($HowToIntroduceYourself = 1)>>
    //很巧居然以前見過，但主角不爽。
    //說猜到的，但是感覺不太開心是故意這樣講的
    Frances Cheng: Do you feel offended that Mr. Hsiao didn't remember you?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站歪頭) >>
    Frances Cheng: For a second, you felt kind of...gloomy.
    Frances Cheng: I was a bit surprised, honestly.
    Frances Cheng: I thought you don't care about what others think...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站歪頭返回) >>
<<#EndIf>>
<<#If($HowToIntroduceYourself = 2)>>
    //很巧居然以前見過，程芳還開玩笑。
    //猜到的，像是主角在搞笑
    Frances Cheng: Talking about surprises, you knew Mr. Hsiao? What a coincidence!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站歪頭) >>
    Frances Cheng: Maybe not really surprising, come to think of it.
    Frances Cheng: You used to work for the same security company. Plenty of opportunities to make acquaintances.
    Frances Cheng: ...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站歪頭返回) >>
<<#EndIf>>
 
<<#If($HowToIntroduceYourself > 0)>>
    <<#If($PersonalDataIssue > 1)>>
        Frances Cheng:Ah, right!
    <<#EndIf>>
<<#EndIf>>
 
<<#If($PersonalDataIssue > 1)>>
    //確定提到是男女朋友，PersonalDataIssue = 2 or 3
    Frances Cheng: Why did you say you're my boyfriend?
    Frances Cheng: I asked specifically, no?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰) >>
    Thought: She did...
    Frances Cheng: Things could get tricky if they know about our relationship.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰前傾) >>
    Frances Cheng: My job isn't exactly a friend maker. I have enemies at work, and they will try to hurt me at all costs.
    Frances Cheng: That's why I try to avoid talking about personal matters at the company.
    Frances Cheng: I don't want them to come after you, especially since you're about to start working here.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰前傾返回) >>
    Frances Cheng: I'm a bit quirky when it comes to privacy, you know...
    Thought: I really should not have said that...
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Sorry. I was feeling a bit...possessive, I guess.
        Frances Cheng: ...!?
        Frances Cheng: I see...
        Thought: Fran seems a bit...happy about it?
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Frances Cheng: ...
    Frances Cheng: OK, enough about that!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰返回) >>
    Frances Cheng: I am who I am! Why should I care so much about what they might do?
    Frances Cheng: Forget what I asked you. Just tell them I'm your girlfriend. I'm totally OK with it now.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站抬手) >>
    Thought: Fran...
    Frances Cheng: ...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站抬手返回) >>
    Frances Cheng: Actually, I'm rather happy hearing you say it out loud.
    Frances Cheng: And I wanna apologize for trying to cover it up.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站低落) >>
    Frances Cheng: That was terrible. I'm sorry.
    Thought: Don't be... My bad, forgetting what you asked me to do.
    Thought: But honestly, I was feeling a bit hurt back then for sure.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->It's not a problem at all.
        Frances Cheng: Really? Great!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站低落返回) >>
    ->I was feeling hurt, actually. Only a tiny little bit.
        Frances Cheng: Hmph, sorry...
        Frances Cheng: I'll make it up to you. Promise!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站低落返回) >>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#If($PersonalDataIssue = 3)>>
        Frances Cheng: Ah! But you told him our place is near the Dingan station.
        <<@喔耶耶耶太神啦！>>
        Frances Cheng: Please try not to disclose personal information like that. I really care, you know.
        Frances Cheng: Privacy is a luxury in this day and age. I intend to keep mine.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站歪頭) >>
        Frances Cheng: But I should have told you that before, more than one time. Right?
        Frances Cheng: This is not like you, J...
        Frances Cheng: Hmmm...
        Frances Cheng: Ha! Come on, enough sentimental time!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站歪頭返回) >>
        Frances Cheng: Work, work!
        <<PlayUntil(程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_轉身)>>
        <<Set($DLState,程芳結束月台心得)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    <<#GoTo(@跟程芳的警衛話題告一段落嚕嚕)>>
<<#EndIf>>
 
<<#If($PersonalDataIssue = 1)>> ; //說出頂安站
    Frances Cheng: Didn't you just tell Mr. Hsiao that our place is around Dingan station?
    <<#GoTo(@喔耶耶耶太神啦！)>>
<<#EndIf>>
 
 
Frances Cheng: Really amiable guy, that Mr. Hsiao.
<<@跟程芳的警衛話題告一段落嚕嚕>>
Frances Cheng: OK. Work, work!
<<Set($DLState,程芳結束月台心得)>>
<<PlayUntil(程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_轉身)>>
<<#End>> ; //程芳走去等電梯
 
 
//以下無內容
//以下無內容
//以下無內容
//以下無內容

title: 跟程芳等電梯對話
body:
<<#If($FangElevatorFastOrLate = 1) >>
Frances Cheng: Hey, why are you in such a hurry?
Frances Cheng: Can't wait to start your new job?
<<#EndIf>>
<<#If($FangElevatorFastOrLate = 2) >>
Frances Cheng: Come on, hurry up!
Frances Cheng: You sure are taking your time.
<<#EndIf>>
<<Set($DLState,程芳開始月台心得)>>
Frances Cheng: Are you nervous for your last round of interviews?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭2) >>
Thought: Of course I am. But I wouldn't want Fran to worry about me.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_背站轉頭) >>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Nope.
    Frances Cheng: Haha. That my J, cool as a cucumber.
    Frances Cheng: You'll ace it!
->A little bit nervous.
    Frances Cheng: Relax. Just show them your everyday self.
    Frances Cheng: You're picked by the system. A manager can't easily veto that decision.
    Frances Cheng: Anyhow, you'll be OK. I trust you!
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: I've met your manager a couple of times. She's very capable, and strict, too. Always trying to do the right thing.
Frances Cheng: In a sense, she single-handedly saved this farm from closure.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭返回2) >>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Closure?;<<Set($KnowAboutSilenceIsWeak,0)>>
    Frances Cheng: Yes. Here, Farm 003, is one of Vision Corp's first plants.
    Frances Cheng: These days there are plenty of farms with fancier hardware and higher yield, especially when competitors started to join the game in droves after they opened up the patents.
    Frances Cheng: Vision used to be a critical supplier to the city of Wanpei. Now we are just one of many.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭2) >>
    Frances Cheng: For a while, HQ was seriously thinking about closing this farm down.
    Thought: Really encouraging news for a new employee...
    Frances Cheng: But Ms. Yeh managed to turn the tables. Yield and efficiency multiplied under her leadership.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭返回2) >>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Considering everything, she's the perfect kind of manager.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->What is she like, as a person?
->You said she's strict?
    Frances Cheng: Super strict.
    Frances Cheng: Like the other time at the monthly meeting, she was practically slapping those representatives from HQ in the face for doing a crappy job. You heard it right. Criticizing HQ.
    Frances Cheng: According to my assistant, those working under her should expect only worse.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Ah, right. One more thing!;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭2)>>
Frances Cheng: We don't need IDs at the farm. Just go where you want to go.
Frances Cheng: Cameras use facial recognition to open doors for employees, or not, if you're not authorized.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站抬手2) >>
Frances Cheng: It's handy, although being constantly identified without consent feels creepy.
Thought: What if it's a new employee with no face record, like me?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站抬手返回2) >>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->The company knows my face? How?
    Frances Cheng: You do face ID every time you file taxes, right?
    Frances Cheng: The government knows everyone's face.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭返回2)>>
    Frances Cheng: Then they grant key suppliers access to their biometric database.
    Frances Cheng: Big corporations have privileges like this. You'll get used to it.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭2)>>
    Thought: Get used to it? That's not like Fran.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->I thought you were not the "get used to it" type.
        Frances Cheng: I'm not.
        Frances Cheng: But it's not like I have any other option. Getting used to it doesn't necessarily mean I agree with it.
    ->Clever design. Maximized efficiency.
        Frances Cheng: With great efficiency comes great risk.
        Frances Cheng: I like efficiency like everyone else, but we can't just overlook risks that are out of reasonable control.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Totally agreed.
            Frances Cheng: I'm glad we have an agreement on that.
        ->If a risk is within reasonable control, it's not much of a risk, right?
            Frances Cheng: ...
            Frances Cheng: You're right.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Anyhow, this elevator is controlled by the same identification system. We can't go in at the same time.
Frances Cheng: I'm going Upstairs, where you don't have security clearances.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What if I just walk in before the door closes?
    Frances Cheng: Huh? I never thought about it...;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭返回2)>>
    Frances Cheng: Um...
    Frances Cheng: It'll probably refuse to move?;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭2)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Shall we try it out?
        Frances Cheng: Ha! You're naughty, aren't you?
        Frances Cheng: Let's not, though. What if it triggers the security alarm or something?
    ->Sounds silly.
        <<#GoTo(@啦嘰電梯設計傻眼)>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->This system is more trouble than it's worth.
    <<@啦嘰電梯設計傻眼>>
    Frances Cheng: Heh. More trouble when you formally start working here.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: And don't you worry about our after-work plan!;<< Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_背站抬手2)>>
Frances Cheng: You haven't forgotten, have you? I'll take you to the roof for the stunning view.
Frances Cheng: Will let you know when I finish work. Then I'll grant you visitor access.;<< Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_背站抬手返回2)>>
Frances Cheng: With that, you'll be able to take the elevator all the way up!
Frances Cheng: Oops, my ride is here.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭返回2) >>
Frances Cheng: ...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭2) >>
Thought: Something on her mind?
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Something on your mind?
    Frances Cheng: ...No, nothing.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Good luck with the interview! Show them your best!
Frances Cheng: See you around!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_背站轉頭返回2) >>
<<Set($DLState,程芳第一天第一次搭並且進入電梯)>> ; //程芳進入電梯
Thought: Can't afford to lose this opportunity...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_背站轉頭倒播) >>
Thought: Come on, let's get this done.
Thought: Fran said she doesn't mind. Still, I really want to contribute some real income.
Thought: Next, meet up with Eva Yeh the manager. I'm officially employed once she gives the green light.
Thought: Got to locate her office first.
<<Set($DLState,程芳結束月台心得)>>
<<#End>>
 
 
 
//以下無東西
//以下無東西
//以下無東西
//以下無東西

title: 問吳晉峰阿姨在哪？
body:
<<Set($TalkToLilMoutainFirst,true)>>
Jeff Wu: Hmm? Who are you?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_偷懶看主) >>
Jeff Wu: You work here? Where's your uniform?
Jeff Wu: Ha! I see. Mr. Liao sent you, right?
Thought: Who's this Mr. Liao?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah, he sent me.
    Jeff Wu: Ah, um... Hmph.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主後傾) >>
    Jeff Wu: You, you just tell him that...
    Jeff Wu: Um...
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Excuse me. Do you feel alright?
        Jeff Wu: Sure! Totally! Why am I not? Hahaha...
        <<@小蜂工蝦密>>
        Jeff Wu: It's not like I'm taking a smoking break without finishing his assignment first. Yeah.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主後傾返回) >>
        Jeff Wu: I did dutifully reassign his assignment to the new guy. Right.
        Jeff Wu: I left the whole stack of paperwork on his desk. The new guy should know what to do if he's smart. If...
        Jeff Wu: ...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主嘆氣) >>
        Jeff Wu: Alright, I'll go see him and take the consequences...
        Jeff Wu: See ya.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主嘆氣返回) >>
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Wait! Where's the manager's office, please?
            Jeff Wu: Huh? Auntie's office?
            Jeff Wu: You don't know where Auntie's office is?
            Jeff Wu: Floor B2, left hand out of the elevator.
        ->Bye.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#End>>
    ->Just go already.
        Jeff Wu: But I'm on break!
        Jeff Wu: This is my entitled, sacred smoking break!
        <<#GoTo(@小蜂工蝦密)>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Jeff Wu: Dammit...
    Jeff Wu: Why is he back so soon?
    Jeff Wu: Oi, won't you say it's weird?
    Jeff Wu: Does he really need me this very moment?
    <<#GoTo(@小蜂工蝦密)>>
->Wait, who's Mr. Liao?
    Jeff Wu: What kind of question is that?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主後傾) >>
    Jeff Wu: Seriously?
    Jeff Wu: You don't know Mr. Liao? Have you been living under a rock?
    <<@咱們這誰不認識廖哥壓>>
    Jeff Wu: I mean, who DOESN'T know Mr. Liao? Except for new guys maybe.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I'm one of the new guys.
        Jeff Wu: ...Huh?
        Jeff Wu: Dayum! You ARE the new-new guy!;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主後傾抬手) >>
        Jeff Wu: They told us there's a new guy coming and your picture was on the notice.
        Jeff Wu: Shit. The company hires anyone as long as they ask.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主後傾抬手返回) >>
        Jeff Wu: And Mr. Liao told me I owe him a big one for getting me this job.
        Jeff Wu: Maybe I didn't need him to begin with. Could have gotten hired by asking nicely.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主後傾返回) >>
        Jeff Wu: Ah, sorry I'm rambling.
        Jeff Wu: If you have nothing to do with Mr. Liao, then I have nothing to do with you.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主抬手) >>
        Jeff Wu: Be on your merry way, newbie.
        Jeff Wu: I'll find a quiet corner for a cigarette, distraction-free.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主抬手返回) >>
        <<#Simple(5)>>
        ->Wait! Where's the manager's office, please?
            Jeff Wu: Huh? Auntie's office?
            Jeff Wu: Floor B2, left hand out of the elevator.
        ->Bye.
            Jeff Wu: Ciao!
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#End>>
    ->Mind your damn language.
        Jeff Wu: Heeey, why so serious?
        Jeff Wu: I'm just being my friendly self, haha...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主後傾返回) >>
        Jeff Wu: Nice to meet you, as long as Mr. Liao isn't involved...
        Thought: A change of attitude under the slightest confrontation...
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Chillax. I'm not mad.
            Jeff Wu: Huh...?
            Jeff Wu: You were faking it?
            Jeff Wu: Damn good actor you are, man...
            Jeff Wu: For a second I thought you were gonna punch me.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主嘆氣) >>
            Jeff Wu: Watch it when you try the mean face next time.
            Jeff Wu: Look at you, all tall and beefy like a gangsta. Might give people a heart attack.
            Thought: ...
            Jeff Wu: So, what's your business?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看主嘆氣返回) >>
            <<#GoTo(@告訴小峰沒事啦賣緊張)>>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Jeff Wu: What you bothering me for?
        <<@告訴小峰沒事啦賣緊張>>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->I'm still waiting for the answer. Who's Mr. Liao?
            Jeff Wu: Mr. Liao is the deputy in charge of coordination and supervision at the Screening Division.
            Jeff Wu: Also the number one in seniority.
            Jeff Wu: OK, now we're done.
            Jeff Wu: I'll find a quiet corner for a cigarette, distraction-free.
            <<#Simple(5)>>
            ->Wait! Where's the manager's office, please?
                Jeff Wu: Huh? You mean Auntie's office?
                Jeff Wu: Floor B2, left hand out of the elevator.
            ->Goodbye.
                Jeff Wu: Goodbye.
            <<#EndSimple>>
            <<#End>>
        ->Where's the manager's office, please?
            Jeff Wu: Um, floor B2, left hand out of the elevator. You can't miss it.
            Jeff Wu: OK, now we're done, newbie.
            Jeff Wu: I'll find a quiet corner for a cigarette, distraction-free.
            Jeff Wu: Goodbye.
            <<#End>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
 
 
 
 
//以下無東西
//以下無東西
//以下無東西
//以下無東西

title: 阿姨初登場
body:
Sky Qiu: As clearly stated in my report, the profit margin of this contract is flexible.
Sky Qiu: In fact, there's ample wiggle room as long as we do not commit to a specific maximum flops.
Sky Qiu: The client likes flexibility, we give them flexibility. Win-win!;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣抱胸) >>
Eva Yeh: ...
Eva Yeh: That concludes your proposal, I hope?
Eva Yeh: <y>Now, Mr. Qiu, listen very carefully.</y>;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_起身) >>
Eva Yeh: <y>My job is to make profit, indeed. On the other hand, I MUST uphold the rights of our contributors!</y>
Sky Qiu: We are running a business—;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣抱胸抬手) >>
Eva Yeh: Don't even try to lecture me on commercial operation and balance sheets. I know them better than you do!;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣抱胸抬手返回) >>
Eva Yeh: Profitability is NOT an excuse to abuse contributors!
Eva Yeh: They are our partners, not company assets!
Eva Yeh: They have the right to reasonable benefits. That. Is. The. Bottom. Line!
Eva Yeh: <y>On top of profit, a business has a reputation!</y>;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_起身手指) >>
Eva Yeh: <y>We must build trust!</y>
Eva Yeh: By losing a little immediate profit, we are planning for the long term. Don't tell me you're naïve like that.
Sky Qiu: Please take a closer look at these figures, Ms. Yeh. Clearly that the juicers—;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_起身手指返回) >>
Eva Yeh: Are you trying to uproot the entire system based on one quarter's performance analysis?;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣抱胸返回) >>
Eva Yeh: Take your stupid proposal, show yourself out of that door. Don't let me see you again, ever.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_起身返回) >>
Eva Yeh: I've had enough of you and your proposal, all this nagging nonsense, week after week.
Sky Qiu: Firing me, huh? What age do you think this is? 2000s?;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣插腰) >>
Sky Qiu: A manager isn't authorized to fire people on a whim, in case you're not aware of it.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_坐下) >>
Sky Qiu: Have you checked my performance record? Top of the line, in every single review.
Sky Qiu: Good luck trying to convince the system to fire me.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣插腰抬頭) >>
Sky Qiu: Don't try too hard. When it comes to your words against my words, the system might as well fire YOU.
Sky Qiu: Let me remind you of all the power that you don't have—;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣插腰抬頭返回) >>
Eva Yeh: I'm well aware.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺) >>
Eva Yeh: If the AI is stupid enough to let you into the company, it won't be too hard to make it kick you out.
Eva Yeh: Now get lost.
Sky Qiu: You...
Sky Qiu: ...;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣插腰返回) >>
Sky Qiu: Good. Very good. You know what? I've had enough of you.
Sky Qiu: I should have known that you wouldn't listen to facts and reason.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣抱胸) >>
Sky Qiu: Go on, keep on playing the saint on your high horse.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣抱胸抬手) >>
Sky Qiu: All this talk about juicer rights, it's all hypocrisy. Ask around the company and every single soul would agree with me.
Eva Yeh: ...;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣抱胸抬手返回) >>
Sky Qiu: ...
Eva Yeh: ...
Eva Yeh: Mr. Qiu.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >>
Eva Yeh: You're a smart man. Heartless, but smart nonetheless.
Eva Yeh: I believe you will find a successful career.
Sky Qiu: ...
Eva Yeh: Do me a favor. Don't be one of the bad guys.
Eva Yeh: The world has more than enough of them already.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >>
Sky Qiu: This world we live in, it takes a bad guy to win.
Eva Yeh: For that reason, I'm firing you here and now.
Eva Yeh: If only as a statement that a bad guy will NOT win, not under my leadership.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >>
Sky Qiu: ...
Eva Yeh: However, I will endorse you to the Fengquan Farm.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手) >>
Eva Yeh: You have found a dead end here. But over there, you will start anew, with much more opportunities.
Sky Qiu: I, um...;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_生氣抱胸返回) >>
Eva Yeh: Just be a better man.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手返回) >>
Eva Yeh: That is all I ask from you.
Sky Qiu: ...
Eva Yeh: Now, goodbye.
Sky Qiu: ...
Sky Qiu: Goodbye.
<<#End>>

//以下無內容
//以下無內容
//以下無內容

title: 阿姨開始跟主角搭話
body:
//提示玩家怎麼選阿姨會喜歡自己(正面)，覺得有效的選項就打(有效)
 
Eva Yeh: How does it feel, seeing the manager firing someone right before your interview?
Thought: Feels terrible.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->A little bit nervous.
    Eva Yeh: Is that so?
    Eva Yeh: Good. I appreciate honesty.;<< PlayUntil (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐點頭) >>
->Not feeling anything in particular.
    Eva Yeh: Great.;<< PlayUntil (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐點頭) >>
    Eva Yeh: Truth or lie, we will tell soon enough.
<<#EndSimple>>
 
Eva Yeh: You should see it as good news. One more vacancy in the team, now your chance has increased.
Eva Yeh: ...But how did you get in when I was in a session with someone else?;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾) >>
Eva Yeh: Silencio should have locked you out.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Who's Silencio?
    Eva Yeh: The AI controlling everything in this plant, that door over there included.
    Eva Yeh: It has a name. Silencio.
->The door just opened of its own accord on approach.
    Eva Yeh: It means Silencio is granting you access.
    Eva Yeh: Don't worry. Whatever the cause is, it's not your fault.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Eva Yeh: Probably trying to prank me, knowing how much I hate it.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Meaning...your AI is self-aware?
    Eva Yeh: ...
    Eva Yeh: Of course not.
    Eva Yeh: Where's your sense of humor?
->Why the hate?
    Eva Yeh: Because it's making everyone who works here nuts.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Eva Yeh: OK, enough chitchat.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾返回) >>
Eva Yeh: Come here.
<<#End>>

title: 阿姨跟主角正式對話
body: //包含一開始的對話，計算玩家的刑為。最後阿姨會評價玩家是勇敢積極、膽小，還是無趣保守，坦承錯誤還是裝懂。還是怪 //還會計算玩家懂不懂這行，用路上的調查物件() Eva Yeh: Jason Dai, is it? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Yes.; <> ;//(有效)正面 Eva Yeh: Great. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Sorry I don't have a spare chair. You might have to stand for a while. Thought: Hey, I'm not blind. That's an empty chair over there... Eva Yeh: I see that you have put on your uniform. Good.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐點頭) >> Eva Yeh: I like people who take the initiative. You are off to a good start. Thought: I should thank that fired guy for setting her expectations low... Eva Yeh: Alright, let's cut to the chase. Eva Yeh: You want a job.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾) >> Eva Yeh: I want someone who can do a job well. Eva Yeh: Let's start from the basics. Eva Yeh: Wanpei City operates on a central AI. It controls everything. The AI runs on computational power, or "flops" in colloquial terms, and that comes from this flop farm here.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾返回) >> Eva Yeh: In other words, if we take one day's break, the whole Wanpei goes offline. Eva Yeh: I trust you're well aware of that? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes, of course.; <> ; //(有效)不懂行 Eva Yeh: Of course NOT. Thought: ...What? Eva Yeh: Obviously you didn't do your homework but want to impress nonetheless.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺) >> Eva Yeh: Maybe I shouldn't set expectations too high. Who does their own homework in the age of AI, right? Thought: Excuse me? The interview notice explicitly said "no special preparation required"? Thought: So I read through everything in the package and nothing else... Thought: How am I supposed to answer macroeconomic questions like that?;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->But the notice said "no special preparation required". Eva Yeh: Not required, but it didn't stop you from doing so, right? Eva Yeh: If you really want the job that much... Eva Yeh: If I were you, I'd cover all sorts of additional preparations, just in case. Eva Yeh: But you obviously did not. Thought: ... ->What exactly did I get wrong? ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->That doesn't sound right. ($KnowAboutSilenceIsWeak); <> ; //(有效)懂行 Eva Yeh: Yes.;<< PlayUntil (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐點頭) >> Eva Yeh: I see that you are well-prepared for this interview. Thought: Thank you, Fran, for all those talks about work at home. Eva Yeh: What I just said was an overstatement. Eva Yeh: Intentionally made to test your knowledge. <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Truth is, there's an abundance of flop farms. 23 of them around Wanpei alone. Eva Yeh: Out of these, 18 beat us by generations in terms of hardware.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手) >> Eva Yeh: In other words, Wanpei doesn't need us. Do you get that? Eva Yeh: We are replaceable, and our competitors will try everything to make us obsolete.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手返回) >> Eva Yeh: Will you let that happen, suppose you're hired? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->That will not happen, not on my watch.; <> ; //(有效)正面 Eva Yeh: I like the confidence. Eva Yeh: But of course you'd say that, as a job seeker. Eva Yeh: Do you really mean it? We will see soon enough. ->I'll give it my best shot. Eva Yeh: Best shot, worst shot, I don't care, to be honest. Eva Yeh: As long as you deliver what I need, I'd call it a good shot. <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Farm 003, aka Silencio, used to be a plant of cutting-edge technology.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手) >> Eva Yeh: That was twenty years ago. These days? Every single flop farm beats us in hardware. Eva Yeh: Silencio is a thing of the past, refusing to let go...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手返回) >> Eva Yeh: What we lack in hardware, we try to make up for it with software.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> Eva Yeh: When other farms try to make more profit by cutting back on contributor benefits... Eva Yeh: We go the other way, by treating our contributors as well as we can. Eva Yeh: We care about their wellbeing, financially and physically, to secure a reliable supply of flops.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Smart move. Eva Yeh: Nope, I wouldn't call it smart. Eva Yeh: It's a very risky approach. Any failure could be catastrophic.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺) >> Eva Yeh: But it's tailor-made for what Silencio has. Thought: She looks proud of it... Eva Yeh: Also, don't agree with everything I say. We don't encourage ass-kissing here. Eva Yeh: Don't bother trying to flatter me. Won't work.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes, ma'am. Eva Yeh: Great. ->When I say it, I mean it. Eva Yeh: Understand? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes, ma'am. ->I apologize. Eva Yeh: Great. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->But that won't look good on the cost side.; <> ; //(有效)懂行 Eva Yeh: You see a problem, you point it out. Good.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺) >> Thought: Looks like I gained a little bit ground. Eva Yeh: Indeed it won't look good, but only in the short term.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >> Eva Yeh: Keep the practice for two years or more, there is a visible difference. While other farms are losing contributor efficiency, our is going up. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: There, enough about the company. Now let's talk about you.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾) >> Eva Yeh: Your presence in this office means Silencio has decided to hire you. Eva Yeh: It's an informed decision, based on every record about you that can be located.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is it up to Silencio? Eva Yeh: Almost all companies these days are making hiring decisions with AI. Vision Corp is no exception. Eva Yeh: You have been serving in the army. Not your fault for lacking such knowledge. Eva Yeh: The record shows, though, you worked as a security guard after discharged from the army?;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> Eva Yeh: The employer was… Airtight Security? I thought they had AI-powered recruitment, too? Eva Yeh: Anyway... <<#GoTo(@在這個資訊、情報就是一切的時代)>> ->Every record about me? Eva Yeh: Yeah.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐點頭) >> Eva Yeh: We know everything, including your military service and all the trouble you caused there. Eva Yeh: Oh?;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> Eva Yeh: You worked as a security guard after discharged from the army? The employer was... Airtight Security. <<@在這個資訊、情報就是一切的時代>> Eva Yeh: Information is power, Mr. Dai.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: Corporations such as Vision have access to everything they want to know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: As long as the recruitment procedure is concerned, this interview is not required at all. Eva Yeh: However, I do not trust the AI and the system it stands for. I believe people cannot be boiled down to figures and records. Thought: For a second, she sounded super serious. Eva Yeh: This job is not a pleasant one. You will be dealing with some of the poorest people.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐拿筆) >> Eva Yeh: In a sense, you will see the underbelly of this society, the part that everyone wants to sweep under the rug. Eva Yeh: I have interviewed many candidates better than you, or so their records suggest. Most of them can't face such reality. Eva Yeh: It doesn't happen overnight. Day in, day out, they pick up what they see and feel on the job. Misery, anxiety, cynicism, and worse. Eva Yeh: Tiny changes add up. A few months later, you wouldn't recognize them. Eva Yeh: It's as if the same body is hosting another soul. Eva Yeh: The point of this interview is to make sure, I hope, that you will not end up like them. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Trust me, I can deal with it!; <> ; //(有效)正面 Eva Yeh: Confident, huh. Eva Yeh: Great. ->That sounds exaggerated. Eva Yeh: Sounds exaggerated, indeed. Eva Yeh: But it actually happened, in front of my eyes. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: First of all, I need you to take a test drive, to see if you can get along with this job.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐拿筆返回) >> Eva Yeh: For the next couple of days, you will be on field practice, working as if you are already hired. Eva Yeh: Note that I said "as if". Your employment depends on the performance of this field practice. Thought: The interview notice didn't mention anything about field practice... <<#Simple(6)>> ->I thought this interview was the last step? Eva Yeh: You thought it wrong. ->Why field practice? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Being a practical person, I'd like to know that every purchase is worth its price.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手) >> Eva Yeh: Today, you're assigned to the Screening Division. Tomorrow, Ops Division. Thought: ...But I thought I was a candidate for the Ops Division only?;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Roger. Eva Yeh: That's it? Eva Yeh: Aren't you curious about why I'm sending you to Screening? It's out of scope. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Not really. I appreciate the additional chance.; <> Eva Yeh: Ha, I see.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐點頭) >> Eva Yeh: More doing, less talking. I could use a man like that. ->Now that you've mentioned it, I am. Eva Yeh: OK. About why you're sent to Screening... <<#GoTo(@但我錄取的只有操作組吧)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I thought I was a candidate for Ops only? Eva Yeh: You are. But like I said... <<@但我錄取的只有操作組吧>> Eva Yeh: Silencio is in charge of deciding what candidates are qualified for, not me. Eva Yeh: You applied for both divisions. Silencio thought you're fit for Ops, but I want you to try both. Eva Yeh: Maybe you're good for neither. Let's see. Thought: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Keep in mind that today and tomorrow will be critical for your career outlook.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾) >> Eva Yeh: Now head to the Screening office and find their lead, Wayne Zheng. He will walk you through the rest of it. Eva Yeh: If there are any questions, now is the time to ask.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾返回) >> <<@第一次來搞不清楚狀況所以繼續問阿姨>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Do I get paid for field practice? ($DoIGetToGetSomePay) <> Eva Yeh: Of course you are, and generously. You won't be disappointed.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐點頭) >> Eva Yeh: What I'm looking for is talent, and for that I'm more than willing to pay a fair price. Eva Yeh: Prove yourself and get paid. <<#Simple(6)>> ->I haven't proven anything yet, though. Eva Yeh: Right. But again, you are listed as a candidate by Silencio. Eva Yeh: I hate it with a passion, but that doesn't blind me.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> Eva Yeh: I know that every decision it makes is well-informed. Eva Yeh: You are a chance that I'm willing to take. Eva Yeh: So, the qualification alone has earned you the pay for the field practice. Take it with peace of mind.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Where's the Screening office, please? ($WhereIsMyNewOffice) <> Eva Yeh: Ouside my office, on the right hand side. ->How am I doing so far? ($AskAboutSoFarAmIDoingWell) <> Eva Yeh: Straightforward, aren't you? Thought: Damn, I could have been more diplomatic... Eva Yeh: Not a bad thing, haha!;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺) >> Eva Yeh: Being straightforward is a rare quality these days. Thought: Phew... I thought I was done for... Eva Yeh: Let's put it this way.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >> <<#If($AuntThinkIAmPositive<>3)>> <<#If($AuntThinkIAmWellInform<>2)>> Eva Yeh: I have no idea yet. Eva Yeh: If you're wondering how I feel about you, I feel nothing. Eva Yeh: Is that good news or bad news? Well, it could go either way. Thought: Meaning I obviously didn't screw up, but haven't really earned any points either. Eva Yeh: From here on, it's all up to you. Show me your worth. <<#GoTo(@問阿姨我表現的後母後結束)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> <<#If($AuntThinkIAmPositive=3)>> Eva Yeh: I think you're not bad. Eva Yeh: My farm could use someone like you. <<#EndIf>> <<#If($AuntThinkIAmWellInform=2)>> Eva Yeh: You're knowledgeable, to a reasonable extent, about the job and the industry. Eva Yeh: This has earned you additional points. <<#EndIf>> Eva Yeh: However, what I think doesn't matter. Eva Yeh: It's not that hard to prepare for an interview. Eva Yeh: I need to see how well you operate in real-life scenarios. <<@問阿姨我表現的後母後結束>> ->I don't have any more questions. <<#GoTo(@阿姨教你問問題你跟他說真低問完了)>> <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Any more questions? <<#GoTo(@第一次來搞不清楚狀況所以繼續問阿姨)>> <<@阿姨教你問問題你跟他說真低問完了>> <<#If($WhereIsMyNewOffice=1)>> //沒問過辦公室在哪。 Eva Yeh: Wait. Aren't you asking where's the Screening office? <<#Simple(999999)>> ->I know where it is. Eva Yeh: Oh? Eva Yeh: Which floor? You tell me. <<#Simple(999999)>> ->This floor. Eva Yeh: Yes. Eva Yeh: A keen mind, and observant. Eva Yeh: You're free to go now. <<#End>> ->It's on B4. ->It's on B7. ->It's on B8. Eva Yeh: Incorrect.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐拿筆) >> Thought: Crap. Eva Yeh: If you don't know something, ask. Eva Yeh: A seemingly stupid question is better than screwing up. Eva Yeh: This should be common sense. Eva Yeh: ...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐拿筆返回) >> Eva Yeh: OK, you're free to go now. <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Ah, right. Where is the office, please? Eva Yeh: Should have asked without me reminding. Eva Yeh: Out of my door, right hand side. Eva Yeh: OK, you're free to go now. <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Eva Yeh: You're free to go now. <<#End>> //以下沒東西 //以下沒東西 //以下沒東西 //以下沒東西

title: 初次進辦公室
body: Lawrence Chang: You, stop there! Lawrence Chang: Who are you? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Jason Dai, the new guy. Lawrence Chang: New guy, huh. Nice.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰) >> Lawrence Chang: Am I supposed to trust you like that? ->Who are you? Lawrence Chang: Huh? Were you born in a barn?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰) >> Lawrence Chang: Learn your manners. Introduce yourself first. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Sorry, my bad. Lawrence Chang: Hmph. That's more like it. ->As if you introduced yourself first. Lawrence Chang: I, uh... Lawrence Chang: I mean... Lawrence Chang: Why should I? You don't belong here! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Nothing to say for yourself? Fishy dude? <<#EndSimple>> <> Edith Yeh: Be nice, Lawrence! Edith Yeh: Silencio opened the door for him, meaning he does belong here. Lawrence Chang: Could be a system glitch. Or maybe he's a hacker! ;<>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰手指) >> Edith Yeh: Jason Dai, is it? New recruitment? Edith Yeh: Nice to meet you. I'm Edith Yeh.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰手指返回) >> Edith Yeh: Chief administrative assistant of the Screening Division. Thought: Chief in the title. Should I impress her? Edith Yeh: Relax. Carrying a "chief" in the title doesn't mean I'm your boss.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站抬手) >> Thought: How can I relax when she reads my mind like that?;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站抬手返回) >> Edith Yeh: Truth be told, my job is to take care of trivial matters for Auntie.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站插腰) >> Quentin Qiu: Trivial matters, like, carrying mauled victims out of her office. Saw you do it the other day.;<> Tyler Cao: Ahem!;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭) >>;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站插腰看內) >> Tyler Cao: December 2. Jean Tsai. Reason of death, asking for a raise for the 4th time. Quentin Qiu: Huh... That's what it was about...;<> Edith Yeh: Yeah, sometimes Auntie can be brutal...;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站插腰看內返回) >> Lawrence Chang: Brutal, in the physical sense.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰抬手) >> Quentin Qiu: Haha! You experienced first-hand on your first day.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰抬手返回) >> Quentin Qiu: How did it go, new guy? Seen the savage side of Auntie already?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺) >>;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站插腰返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sort of. Quentin Qiu: Heh. Don't take it too seriously. She's not a bad person.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_看內) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Not me. She was disciplining another guy. Quentin Qiu: Oh? Who was it?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰看內) >> Quentin Qiu: Ah, yes! Auntie fired another one? Edith Yeh: Enough, QQ! Edith Yeh: Respect other people's privacy. Quentin Qiu: I'm asking out of innocent curiosity. Quentin Qiu: Anyway, now that you've seen Auntie's dark side, you're part of the coven! <<#GoTo(@誰跟你在那邊入夥啦怪欸)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Quentin Qiu: Don't take offense. She's like that. Could happen to anybody.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰看內) >> Lawrence Chang: Me, for example. Quentin Qiu: Having survived Auntie's rage makes you one of us now! ->Actually, she's pretty nice. Lawrence Chang: Seriously? I swear she wanted to kill me the first time we met.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_看內) >> Quentin Qiu: I'd call it bullshit... Quentin Qiu: But again, your face suggests you mean it.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰看內) >> Quentin Qiu: Was she, like, actually nice to you? Is it even possible? Lawrence Chang: Unfair! Quentin Qiu: No, that's not good. You're not one of our coven. Quentin Qiu: To join the club, one must acquire the mental trauma bestowed by Auntie. <<#EndSimple>> <<@誰跟你在那邊入夥啦怪欸>> <> Cathy Hsieh: Don't count me in. I'm no part of a coven!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >> Cathy Hsieh: Hi, Mr. Dai. I'm Cathy Hsieh, technical support.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_看內返回) >> Lawrence Chang: Cathy's a tech witch. She fixes stuff in a blink.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰抬手) >> Lawrence Chang: Like the other day I tipped a whole bottle of soda over my computer, she fixed it before I could clean up the table.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰抬手返回) >> Cathy Hsieh: I asked Logistics for a replacement. Not much fixing, really. Cathy Hsieh: And that should be QQ's responsibility. Don't ask me next time. Lawrence Chang: Awwww, you're awfully modest.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回) >> Cathy Hsieh: The replacement comes at a cost, which should have been deducted from his salary. Please double check, Edith.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰返回) >> Edith Yeh: Sure.;<> Lawrence Chang: What? Nobody told me that!;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >> Lawrence Chang: You must be joking. Right??;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_看外) >> Lawrence Chang: I haven't even received my first paycheck yet! Lawrence Chang: Cathy? Tell me you didn't mean it? Lawrence Chang: Come on, it was just a quick fix! Lawrence Chang: Please??? ;<> Edith Yeh: ...;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_看外返回) >> Edith Yeh: Anyway, welcome aboard! Edith Yeh: I guess Auntie told you to find the team lead for further guidance?;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站插腰) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Right, she did. ->She mentioned someone called Wayne Zheng. <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: I see... Edith Yeh: Unfortunately, the team lead is not here at the moment...;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站插腰低頭) >> Edith Yeh: I think he's running errands for someone. Thought: I thought a team lead should be immune to such requests. Edith Yeh: OK, here's how it goes!;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站插腰低頭返回) >> Edith Yeh: I'll show you to your cubicle. This way, please.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_側站插腰返回) >> <<#End>> //以下結束 //以下結束 //以下結束 //以下結束

title: 邱書凱第一次對話叫你買飲料
body: Sky Qiu: Hmm?;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭) >> Sky Qiu: Huh? Who the heck are you? Thought: Ouch, that attitude. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->My name is Jason Dai, interviewee. Sky Qiu: Ah, the new guy. ->Who the heck are you? Sky Qiu: Did you... Sky Qiu: ... Sky Qiu: Alright. I'll start with the self introduction. Sky Qiu: Sky Qiu, day shift. Sky Qiu: Being here at this time, you must be an interviewee. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Yes. Name's Jason. Jason Dai. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Sky Qiu: Looking for the manager? Sky Qiu: She's at a meeting, although by now she should be on the way back.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭返回) >> Sky Qiu: Appointments are first come, first served. Understand? Sky Qiu: I'll go in first when she comes back. You wait for your turn. Thought: I haven't said anything yet! Sky Qiu: Where's your uniform?;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭) >> Thought: In the backpack. Not ready to put it on yet. Sky Qiu: Go find a restroom and get changed. Without the uniform, Silencio won't let you into any office. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Who's Silencio? Sky Qiu: ...The farm itself. <<#GoTo(@邱書楷機車的說明及竟跟制服的關係)>> ->Why do I need the uniform to visit offices? <<@邱書楷機車的說明及竟跟制服的關係>> Sky Qiu: The whole farm is controlled by a central AI, which identifies and tracks all personnel on site. Sky Qiu: If it doesn't recognize you as an employee, it won't grant access to offices. Sky Qiu: ...Can't believe you come to an interview without the slightest clue about the job. <<#Simple(8)>> ->None of your business, douchebag. Sky Qiu: Yeah. Happy failing your interview, sucker. ->Thank you for the information. Really appreciated. Sky Qiu: You're welcome. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Sky Qiu: Now, listen up. You need two things to go around the farm. Your face, and your uniform. Sky Qiu: Every uniform is unique, bearing a code that represents your job title and security clearance. Sky Qiu: ...Oh, right. Sky Qiu: Since you have nothing better to do, go run some errands for me. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You don't have anything better to do, either. Sky Qiu: Actually, I have. I'm preparing my proposal. Sky Qiu: A proposal that I will show to Ms. Yeh very soon. ->Asking a total stranger to run errands? Sky Qiu: Yes, by the power of seniority. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Sky Qiu: Go downstairs and buy me a bottle of soda. Sky Qiu: There's a vending machine. <<#Simple(4)>> ->Which floor, exactly? Sky Qiu: Ah, right. You're too new to know where everything is. Sky Qiu: B4, where the consultation lobby is. Sky Qiu: Vending machine's right next to the elevator. <<#GoTo(@猜完飲料機在幾樓)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Sky Qiu: Not asking which floor it is? You have never been here before, after all. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Which floor is it? Sky Qiu: Geez, you are slow, aren't you? Sky Qiu: Vending machine's on B4, where the Consultation lobby is. Sky Qiu: If you don't know something, ask. Won't find a job without learning the basics. ->I didn't agree to run your errands.;<> Sky Qiu: You don't want to say no. <<@拒絕幫買飲料一般>> Sky Qiu: What's your problem with a quick trip? Sky Qiu: Making an enemy, who is your senior, before your interview? Sky Qiu: Come on, you're smarter than that. Sky Qiu: Rule one of landing a job, learn to get along with your colleagues. ->I know which floor it is. Sky Qiu: Oh? Sky Qiu: Which floor is it? <<#GoTo(@說自己知道飲料機在幾樓)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<@猜完飲料機在幾樓>> Sky Qiu: Now, pay attention. I want a bottle of Hualive. Sky Qiu: NOT Huolize.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭返回) >> Sky Qiu: Two different brands, but look and sound similar. Look very, very carefully. Sky Qiu: My stomach doesn't agree with Huolize. Makes me feel woozy. Senses are all screwed up. Sky Qiu: In severe cases I may feel sick or pukey. <<#If($ISayNoIWontBuyForYou=1)>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I said I'm not going. ->I said no. Are you deaf or what? Sky Qiu: Heard you loud and clear. Sky Qiu: I'm giving you helpful information just in case... Sky Qiu: ...that you suddenly smarten up and realize how a tiny errand could mean a lot to your career outlook. Sky Qiu: For example, I could say something nice about you to the manager, right before your interview.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I see. You're right. I'm gonna get your soda.;<> <<@邱書凱說為五斗米折腰很讚喔>> Sky Qiu: Good. It's always good to come to your senses. Sky Qiu: Better late than never. Sky Qiu: Seize opportunities. Give favors. Eventually people will give you favors in return.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭返回) >> ->Nah, I don't need your nice words. Sky Qiu: Let me put it another way. Sky Qiu: What if I say something awful about you to the manager, right before your interview? <<#GoTo(@邱書凱最後一次給要不要幫買的選擇)>> ->How do I know whether your opinion matters? Sky Qiu: Exactly. You don't know. Sky Qiu: Wanna find out? <<@邱書凱最後一次給要不要幫買的選擇>> Thought: Jerk. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->OK. I'm getting you soda.;<> <<#GoTo(@邱書凱說為五斗米折腰很讚喔)>> ->I still say no. Sky Qiu: You've made up your mind.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭返回) >> ->No, and no. Screw you. Sky Qiu: What?! Sky Qiu: Tsk. Better watch your damn mouth. Sky Qiu: Congrats, you just managed to make an enemy. Sky Qiu: Before even getting the job.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Sky Qiu: That's it for now. Sky Qiu: Whatever you decide, just make yourself scarce. Sky Qiu: I need to focus on the proposal.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Aren't you giving me money for the soda? ($ISayNoIWontBuyForYou) Sky Qiu: Ha! A quick change of mind, huh? Sky Qiu: No worries. Sodas are free of charge. Sky Qiu: Part of the employee benefits. ->Hold on. Am I supposed to pay for your soda? Sky Qiu: Thought you'd never ask. Sky Qiu: No worries. Sodas are free of charge. Sky Qiu: Part of the employee benefits. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Sky Qiu: Are we clear? Now get going.;<< Play (邱書凱, MBU_邱書凱_看資料轉頭返回) >> Thought: ...I need to find a restroom and change into my uniform. <> <<#End>>

title: 飲料機對話
body:
Quentin Qiu: ...
Quentin Qiu: ...
Quentin Qiu: ...
Quentin Qiu: Hmm?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右) >>
Quentin Qiu: Hey! Want a soda, too?
Quentin Qiu: Sorry, didn't see you there waiting.
Quentin Qiu: I'm having a hard time deciding...
Quentin Qiu: You know what? How about you help me decide?
Quentin Qiu: This machine only serves two brands.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回) >>
Quentin Qiu: And now it's almost empty, with exactly 1 bottle each left.
Quentin Qiu: One is Hualive, the other Huolize.
Quentin Qiu: The look and sound similar, but big difference when it comes to the taste.
<<#Simple(4)>>
->How different?
    Quentin Qiu: Hualive is light, refreshing.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右) >>
    Quentin Qiu: Pairs well with heavy meals to soften the grease.
    Quentin Qiu: Huolize is kind of the opposite.
    Quentin Qiu: It's an energy drink. Basically equal parts caffeine and sugar. Two kinds of high in one package.
    Quentin Qiu: It's not for everyone. Some might feel sick from the kick.
    Quentin Qiu: Not me, though. I'm OK either way.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回) >>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Quentin Qiu: Arrrgh!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站苦惱) >>
Quentin Qiu: Damn, it's too hard to choose between them!
<<#Simple(4)>>
->Just flip a coin.
    Quentin Qiu: You're not helping!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站苦惱返回) >>
    Quentin Qiu: I'm on weight control. Strictly two sodas a day. This decision makes 50% of my day!
    <<#Simple(4)>>
    ->You'd be better off soda-free, for weight control.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右) >>
        Quentin Qiu: Ugh...
        Quentin Qiu: My weight, I have the say!
        Quentin Qiu: Anyway, this is a critical decision. Think. Think!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回) >>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
    << Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站苦惱返回) >>
<<#EndSimple>>
Quentin Qiu: Alright, alright!
Quentin Qiu: How about this?
Quentin Qiu: You pick one for me!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右) >>
Thought: Sky Qiu asked for Hualive.
Quentin Qiu: Hualive? Huolize? Which one? Come on!
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Huolize.
    <<Set($WhatDrinkDoIBought,-1)>>
    Quentin Qiu: I see...
->Hualive.
    <<Set($WhatDrinkDoIBought,1)>>
    Quentin Qiu: I see...
<<#EndSimple>>
Quentin Qiu: Oh.
Quentin Qiu: Maybe you said that because you want the other. Wicked trick, huh?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->No.;<<Set($VenderMachineEnding,1)>>
    Quentin Qiu: Really? Good!
    <<@沒有故意選我不要的啊一般>>
    Quentin Qiu: I said that because I have this nagging habit, you know.
    Quentin Qiu: Every time I have trouble making a decision, I ask someone else to do it for me.
    Quentin Qiu: Then I'll go the other way. Haha!
    Quentin Qiu: Just in case they want to keep the good stuff for themselves.
    <<#Simple(4)>>
    ->Eh, sorry, I did want the other one, alright.;<<Set($VenderMachineEnding,2)>>
        Quentin Qiu: ...Huh?
        Quentin Qiu: Haha!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭笑) >>
        Quentin Qiu: I knew it! You're tricky, aren't you?
        <<#GoTo(@其實想喝某飲料拉拉拉)>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Quentin Qiu: OK. That settles that.
    Quentin Qiu: Thanks bro, and sorry for wasting your time.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背轉頭返回) >>
    Quentin Qiu: See ya.
    
->That is indeed the case.;<<Set($VenderMachineEnding,2)>>
    Quentin Qiu: Haha!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭笑) >>
    Quentin Qiu: I knew it! You're tricky, aren't you?
    Quentin Qiu: Ha! Alright, alright.
    Quentin Qiu: I said that because I have this nagging habit, you know.
    Quentin Qiu: Every time I have trouble making a decision, I ask someone else to do it for me.
    Quentin Qiu: Then I'll go the other way. Haha!
    Quentin Qiu: Just in case they want to keep the good stuff for themselves.
    <<@其實想喝某飲料拉拉拉>>
    Quentin Qiu: Alright, I'll let you have what you want.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭笑返回) >>
    Quentin Qiu: Thanks bro, and sorry for wasting your time.
    Quentin Qiu: See ya.;<< PlayUntil (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭返回) >>
    <<Set($WhatDrinkDoIBought,$WhatDrinkDoIBought*-1)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Set($DLState,球球飲料事件結束他離開)>>

<<#If($WhatDrinkDoIBought=-1)>>
    Thought: Oops, now there's only Huolize, which Sky explicitly doesn't want...
    Thought: ...Shall I buy it?
<<#EndIf>>
<<#If($WhatDrinkDoIBought=1)>>
    Thought: Now there's only Hualive, which Sky specifically asked for...
    Thought: ...Shall I buy it?
<<#EndIf>>
<<#End>>
