title: 調查物件:萬象電子海報
葉慈恩在座位前說明
body: Edith Yeh: Make yourself comfortable. <> Edith Yeh: This is your personal space. I have cleaned it up. Edith Yeh: Hope you like it. <> Lawrence Chang: She did one heck of a good job. The girl before you left the cubicle a mess.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側坐轉頭) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看) >> Cathy Hsieh: Talking about a mess, just look at QQ's desk.;<>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看返回) >> Quentin Qiu: I pretend you didn't say that, because I'm a bigger person.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰) >>;<>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐右看) >> Tyler Cao: Big in the dimensions department, yeah.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰轉頭) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐右看返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Oi!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側坐轉頭返回) >>;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐前傾) >> Edith Yeh: You bunch! Show the new guy your nicer side.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看) >> <> Edith Yeh: Sorry, they are like that. Bickering all the time.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐前傾返回) >>;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰轉頭返回) >> <<#Simple(3)>> ->Don't they get along? Edith Yeh: Don't get me wrong. They just have this rapport of cheekiness... Edith Yeh: Haha... ->It's OK. They are fun. Edith Yeh: Are they? Haha... Edith Yeh: As long as you don't feel uncomfortable. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: So... Let's quickly go over the agenda for today.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰抬手) >> Edith Yeh: You will participate in two procedures of the routine work, consultation and signing. Edith Yeh: Are you familiar with our work?;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Not really. <<@反悔還是要慈恩說明一下嚕>> Edith Yeh: I see... Edith Yeh: No problem. That is to be expected. You were selected by the recruitment algorithm, after all.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰手指) >> Edith Yeh: You're not supposed to know everything before starting. Don't worry. Edith Yeh: I'll bring you up to speed. This won't take long.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰手指返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Sure. Very appreciated. <<@說不熟悉又反悔還是要慈恩說明一下欸>> Edith Yeh: Ahem!;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰咳嗽) >> Edith Yeh: Simply put, a lot of people come to this farm looking for work, on a daily basis. Edith Yeh: The overwhelming majority of them are from slums, not the best part of society. For this reason, we must…;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰咳嗽返回) >> Tyler Cao: Edi?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看返回) >> Edith Yeh: ...;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰轉頭) >>;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_背坐左看) >> Edith Yeh: Sorry, I wandered off a bit.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看) >> Edith Yeh: Back to the subject. They are not like you. The work they look for is flop contribution.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰轉頭返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Flop contribution? Tyler Cao: In layman's terms, knock them out and hook their brains up to the AI network.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看返回) >> Tyler Cao: So they serve as computing units, replacing expensive processors.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_背坐左看返回) >> Thought: Hmmm... Edith Yeh: Right. Exactly like Tyler said.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看) >> Edith Yeh: Computational power, or "flops", is a critical resource in the age of AI.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_背坐左看) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: Consultation means we must meet potential contributors in person.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰抬手) >>;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外返回) >> Edith Yeh: The point is to verify their physical and mental wellbeing, and sign contracts with appropriate candidates. Edith Yeh: That's about the size of it.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰抬手返回) >> Thought: I should find someone and ask about fine details of the job.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_背坐左看返回) >> ->No need. Don't worry. Edith Yeh: Eh? Edith Yeh: Are you sure you don't want an onboarding briefing? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No, I'm good. Edith Yeh: Good. ->Wait. I do need that. <<#GoTo(@說不熟悉又反悔還是要慈恩說明一下欸)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#GoTo(@說不熟悉又反悔還是要慈恩說明一下欸)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I'm quite familiar with it. Edith Yeh: Really? Edith Yeh: Your record doesn't show any experience in flop farming, no? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I've done my homework. Edith Yeh: Good! ->You're right. I don't know much. <<#GoTo(@反悔還是要慈恩說明一下嚕)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳過說明面談跟簽約是啥>> Edith Yeh: One more piece of advice.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰手指) >> Edith Yeh: Based on what I know about Auntie, the outcome of your consultation will count a lot toward your interview. Edith Yeh: You should tread very, very carefully.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰手指返回) >> Tyler Cao: Is it staged this time, too?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看返回) >> Edith Yeh: Of course, we can't afford any issue with screening.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰轉頭) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看) >> Edith Yeh: A new recruitment at Fengquan Farm let a dopehead slip through. Guy almost died on the rack. Did you hear that?;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_背坐左看) >> Thought: What the... Quentin Qiu: Geez!;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰轉頭返回) >> Edith Yeh: That said, your consultation sessions have been staged.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->What do you mean by "staged"? Tyler Cao: Meaning whoever you're gonna see, they are already pre-screened. Tyler Cao: Auntie has a pretty good idea about who's fit and who's not. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: This is not good news for you. Tyler Cao: It means you must find the correct answer, or else you'll have no place in this office. Edith Yeh: Tyler, you're stressing him out.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰轉頭) >> Tyler Cao: Am I wrong? Edith Yeh: ...No. Tyler Cao: You take care, dude. Auntie likes to set traps in these staged tests. Tyler Cao: You have any questions, ask me any time. Edith Yeh: Do you have the time? I reckon you're late on several reports. Tyler Cao: About that...;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_背坐左看返回) >> Tyler Cao: This guy here needs help! Reports could wait! Edith Yeh: I know procrastination is a thing, but what would Mr. Liao say when you keep missing deadlines? Tyler Cao: I, uh, I'll get it done...;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外返回) >> Edith Yeh: Good boy.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看) >> Edith Yeh: OK. Jason, take your time getting familiar with things.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰轉頭返回) >> Edith Yeh: Ah! One more thing that you should know... Edith Yeh: Since today is a field practice, you only have consultation appointments with four candidates. Edith Yeh: I've sent you their profiles. Check your computer when you have time. Edith Yeh: I'm afraid the sessions can't start until Wayne comes back.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰抓頭) >> Edith Yeh: It might take a while. He left not very long ago. Edith Yeh: Take your time going through candidate profiles.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰抓頭返回) >> Edith Yeh: Or you could walk around the office, getting to know your future colleagues. Edith Yeh: That's it. See you later.;<< Play (葉慈恩, MBU_葉慈恩_正站插腰返回) >> Edith Yeh: If you need any help, my desk is over there.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐左看返回) >> <<#End>> //以

title: 調查物件:工作流程指示
body:
//說明算裡供給的運作流程。內容提及將人置入昏迷狀態並與運算網路連接的標準操作流程。
Thought: Hooking up human brains to make a low-cost super computer for AI, huh.
Thought: The idea should be otherwise absurd, but it's our everyday reality...
Thought: Extra real for me, because it's going to be my job.
<<#End>>

title: 隆生主動拍謝
body: //主角用電腦的時候跑來 Lawrence Chang: Um... Hey, wait! Lawrence Chang: Can I borrow you for a minute? Thought: The heck does he want? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Something on your mind? Lawrence Chang: Nah, nothing really! ->No, you can't. Lawrence Chang: Hey, give me a second chance, OK? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: I went over our previous conversation again...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰) >> Lawrence Chang: And realized that I was sort of a dick. Lawrence Chang: The more I think about it, the worse I feel. Can't live with myself if I don't apologize.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰抬手) >> Lawrence Chang: I'm sorry! Thought: This guy is surprisingly...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰抬手返回) >> Thought: ...nice? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No worries. I don't mind. Lawrence Chang: Thank you! ->Just remember to be nice next time. Lawrence Chang: Yeah. I know I have this temper problem. Lawrence Chang: Will definitely pay attention going forward. <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Oh, I'm Lawrence Chang. Lawrence Chang: A new guy, too. Started here last week. Lawrence Chang: You are? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Jason Dai. Lawrence Chang: Jason Dai, huh. ->Name's Dai. Lawrence Chang: Eh? Is that a first or last name? Lawrence Chang: You are, as I recall, Jason Dai, right? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Why ask if you already knew? Lawrence Chang: Just wanna make sure, haha. Lawrence Chang: It would be rude if I don't ask, right? <<#Simple(6)>> ->How did you know my name? Lawrence Chang: Because I'm good at knowing things.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰手指) >> Lawrence Chang: Especially when Edith called you by the name, like, a minute ago. Haha!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰手指返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: I'm the younger one, right? I'll call you Mr. Dai, then.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Just Jason will do. Lawrence Chang: No problem!;<< PlayUntil (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站點頭) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: So, what made you want to work here? Thought: For the money, of course. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because they pay well. Lawrence Chang: Haha! Yeah, makes sense. Lawrence Chang: You're a straightforward guy. We could get along really well.;<< PlayUntil (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站比讚) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Why do you want to work here? <<#GoTo(@問安全帽底迪感麻做這行蛙)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->What about you? Why do you want to work here? <<@問安全帽底迪感麻做這行蛙>> Lawrence Chang: Eh? M-me? Thought: He seems a bit shocked. For what? Lawrence Chang: Um, about that...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->What? ->Why so nervous? Lawrence Chang: N-nothing. Lawrence Chang: You're full of questions, Jason. Haha. <<#Simple(6)>> ->You bombarded me with questions first. Lawrence Chang: Ha, right. Sorry. ->I'm just that kind of guy. Lawrence Chang: I see... ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Say, it's nice to find a colleague as new as myself at a new job. Thought: He's trying to change the subject... Thought: Why? Trying to keep privacy? Could be. <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Anyway, that's all. I just wanted to say I'm sorry.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰抬手) >> Lawrence Chang: Please, I don't want you to feel bad. Lawrence Chang: Gotta go back to work. Bye.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_側站插腰抬手返回) >> <<#End>>

title: 調查物件:戴士傑的個人電腦
問廖哥問題
body: <<#Simple(6)>> ->Hello.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站轉頭左) >> George Liao: Hello. <<#GoTo(@第一次和廖哥說話)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<@第一次和廖哥說話>> //判定之前有沒有跟廖哥說過話 <<#If($IsThisFirstTimeISpeakToLIAU = true)>> <> George Liao: Before you say anything, hear this.;<> George Liao: You youngsters don't know as much as you think. Thought: Youngster? I'm almost 30 years old. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Wouldn't call myself a youngster. George Liao: Right. Youngsters don't like to be called youngsters. Exactly my point. ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: Relax. All I wanted to say is that your job is not an easy one. George Liao: Don't think otherwise simply because everyone in this office seems nice, the team lead included. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do you mean by that? George Liao: Being treated nicely might give you wrong ideas, such as...;<> George Liao: ...overly optimistic expectations. <> ->I'm not counting on an easy job. George Liao: Great. ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: Wayne is young for a team lead, too young for his own good. He hasn't learned how to lead yet. Thought: Here it comes again, age talk. <<#Simple(8)>> ->How old is Wayne? George Liao: About your age.;<> Thought: That... Thought: Kind of young, indeed. George Liao: Now, listen, about Wayne...;<> ->You care an awful lot about age. George Liao: Of course I do.;<> George Liao: The time one has spent in this world means experience, knowledge. George Liao: I have seen and done more stuff than you, am I wrong? George Liao: Now, listen, about Wayne...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: The one thing that he cares about is being a nice guy.;<> George Liao: To that end, he is trying very hard to impress everyone who works under him. George Liao: Being nice is a virtue, alright, but it depends on the timing and occasion.;<> George Liao: In his case, he is not able to play the bad guy when the situation calls for one.;<> George Liao: As a result, our division's performance has been constantly dropping. George Liao: You know as much as I do, that this is a company, not a kindergarten.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->What are you trying to suggest? ->Come to the point already. ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: I'm asking you to adopt realistic expectations. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What if my expectations are already realistic? George Liao: Good for you, then. You're not freshly out of college. George Liao: That is my point, a reminder. ->How realistic should I be? George Liao: Be ready to face what you do not want. George Liao: Consider the possibility that you may not get this job at the end of the day. ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: Like I said, it's not an easy job.;<> George Liao: Don't take this as a threat or a warning. George Liao: I want you to bear uncertainty in mind.;<> George Liao: This office may have a great vibe, but a position for you is not guaranteed yet. Thought: I like this geezer, sort of.;<> Thought: Blunt, a bit arrogant, and all this age talk. Thought: But very much sincere.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I'm aware of all that. George Liao: In that case, consider it random nagging from an old geezer. ->Thank you for the advice. George Liao: Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: Now, your turn. Any questions? <<#GoTo(@問廖吉興問題時間)>> <<#EndIf>> George Liao: Can I help you with anything?;<> <<@問廖吉興問題時間>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What do you do here at the office? ($DoIAskAbeiWhatIsHisWork) <> George Liao: I'm in charge of night shifts, making sure everyone meets their deadlines.;<> George Liao: "Everyone" includes the team lead. Thought: This guy oversees the overseer?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You supervise the team lead? George Liao: You have misunderstood. George Liao: It's not supervision. I'm helping him.;<> George Liao: I'm assigned by Ms. Yeh. She knows Wayne's issues. George Liao: He tends to put his own work aside to help others.;<> ->Including me? George Liao: No. George Liao: You're not yet officially hired, remember? <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: OK, any more questions? <<#GoTo(@問廖吉興問題時間)>> ->All clear. << Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側坐看外返回) >> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> //aaaaaaaa //aaaaaaaa //aaaaaaaa

title: 問球球問題
body: <<#Simple(8)>> ->Hello.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站轉頭右) >> <<#GoTo(@開始跟球球大大說一些話)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> //判斷有沒有過飲料機對話，且判斷結果是哪一種。 /////////////////////要額外檢差買的飲料是哪一種？？ <<@開始跟球球大大說一些話>> <<#If($VenderMachineEnding>0)>> <> Quentin Qiu: Oh, hi!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺) >> Quentin Qiu: Hey, I remember you! Quentin Qiu: The guy who helped me choose my soda, right? Quentin Qiu: Sorry, I'm terrible with faces. Tyler Cao: Terrible-er with debts.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭) >> Quentin Qiu: Hey! I remember owing you $120, alright?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回) >> Tyler Cao: $320.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Whatever! Sending money over in a bit! <<#If($WhatDrinkDoIBought=-2)>> Quentin Qiu: Hey! Wait!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺) >> Quentin Qiu: You're the guy who took the last bottle of Huolize, aren't you? <<#If($VenderMachineEnding=2)>> Quentin Qiu: You did it on purpose, by telling me to take Hualive. <<#EndIf>> Quentin Qiu: And then, I saw Sky puking his guts out in the restroom. Tyler Cao: Why didn't tell me? I'd like to see that.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭) >> Quentin Qiu: Hold on, let me finish.;<< PlayUntil (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭) >> Quentin Qiu: Putting one and one together, I figured Sky made you run his errands, right?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回) >> Quentin Qiu: And you bought him Huolize. Quentin Qiu: But on the other hand, he must have told you not to buy Huolize. You're pranking him? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Special service for his attitude. Quentin Qiu: Bravo! Well played! Ha!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比讚) >> ->I didn't intend to. Quentin Qiu: Okay. Quentin Qiu: The point is, he's puking his guts out and I'm mighty happy!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比讚) >> <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: You guys are talking about Sky? So, you all heard? Tyler Cao: Heard what?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比讚返回) >> Cathy Hsieh: That he's fired. Tyler Cao: Ah, now I've heard. Quentin Qiu: Finally!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後) >> <<#Simple(3)>> ->You don't like him? Quentin Qiu: Who does?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah, he deserves it. Quentin Qiu: Ha! Damn right! ->I don't like him, but still, I feel bad for him. Tyler Cao: Yeah. Finding a new job will be some serious challenge these days. <<#Simple(3)>> ->But Auntie endorsed him for a new job. Tyler Cao: OK, now I agree that he deserves it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Can't say I don't like him yet. Quentin Qiu: Woah, you're the first, who have talked to Sky and not feel any don't-like-ness. Cathy Hsieh: Well, I for one get along rather well with him.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Because you have never collaborated with him on a task, alright? One heck of a backstabbing weasel he is.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後) >> Cathy Hsieh: I had. Wayne once asked me to help Sky with a list management system. Quentin Qiu: Why you? Thought: He sounds a bit sour. For what? Cathy Hsieh: Uh, because I'm the only one in the office with the expertise? Cathy Hsieh: Anyhow, I made him a system as requested. He didn't get to use it in the end, but the collaboration was not bad. Tyler Cao: You mean this system? He told me he made it, every line of code. Let me show you the chat log.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭) >> Cathy Hsieh: ... Cathy Hsieh: What did he say!? Cathy Hsieh: OK, he deserves to be fired! Quentin Qiu: Now you see my point? <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Quentin Qiu: He never saw us as colleagues. Only wanted to use us to his advantage.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Now what advantage does he have, huh?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Ah, right. You have questions for me? <<#GoTo(@開始問球球問題)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> Quentin Qiu: Hey, you have questions for me?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺) >> <<@開始問球球問題>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What do you do here? ($AskBallWhatDoesHeDo) <> Quentin Qiu: Hardware technician, in charge of fixing and servicing all the machines.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手) >> Quentin Qiu: It might sound like what Logistics on B7 do. Similar responsibilities, different areas. Quentin Qiu: They take care of the Cellar. The scope and scale of work is waaay more than mine.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->The Cellar? What's that? Quentin Qiu: Ah, I forgot you're too new to know what's what. Quentin Qiu: The Cellar is the heart of a flop farm. Quentin Qiu: It's where all juicers work. Quentin Qiu: To explain what it is... Let me think.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭) >> Quentin Qiu: Arrgh! I can't explain something that complicated! Quentin Qiu: You will be there for field practice tomorrow. Find out yourself!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Honestly, hardly anyone at Screening ever goes to the Cellar. Quentin Qiu: The company has strict access control, after all. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Could you try a rough description?;<> Quentin Qiu: No can do. Because I've never been there, ha! Quentin Qiu: Cathy went there a couple of times.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後) >> Tyler Cao: But you never talked about it, Cathy?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭) >> Cathy Hsieh: Nothing to talk about. Cathy Hsieh: It's a terrible place. Cathy Hsieh: Huge space, with a suffocating atmosphere. Tyler Cao: ... Quentin Qiu: That's it. You will learn more about it tomorrow.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回) >>;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->They keep talking about "flop contribution". What does that mean? ($AskBallWhatIsCaculateSupply) <> Quentin Qiu: The long version or the short version? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The short version will do. Quentin Qiu: You know these days everything is run by AI, right? Quentin Qiu: Powerful AI need powerful computers, which are super duper expensive.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手) >> Quentin Qiu: So expensive that human brains are cheap in comparison. Quentin Qiu: Flop farms like this one put human brains together into makeshift super computers, churning out countless petaflops to run AI systems. Quentin Qiu: This process is called "flop contribution".;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Understand? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I see. Quentin Qiu: Yeah. <<#GoTo(@穩哥可以跟你講其他知識喔)>> ->What does the long version look like? Quentin Qiu: Haha, here it comes! <<#GoTo(@球球可以再解釋清楚一點算力供給嗎)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I'd prefer the long version. Quentin Qiu: Great! I like inquisitive minds! <<@球球可以再解釋清楚一點算力供給嗎>> Quentin Qiu: Here it goes. This modern world is powered by all kinds of AI systems. Corporations and governments depend on them for virtually everything. Quentin Qiu: Unsurprisingly, they want and need these systems to be increasingly powerful. Quentin Qiu: Better AI systems require better processors, those with computational power measured in millions of petaflops. Quentin Qiu: In other words, punitively expensive. Quentin Qiu: Flop farms were introduced to solve this very problem.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭) >> Quentin Qiu: Vision Corp started it all. They found that as AI replaced humans, unemployment went through the roof and human labor became, um... Quentin Qiu: ...CHEAP. Quentin Qiu: They came up with this technology that combines humans into makeshift super computers.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回) >> Quentin Qiu: I'm sure you can imagine the scale we are talking about. Tons of brains. Quentin Qiu: Thanks to AI, we are never short of unemployed and impoverished people. Quentin Qiu: Just think about it. Distributed computing, applied to human brains.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一) >> Quentin Qiu: A vast network of organic processors! Thought: Mostly importantly, this setup saves huge hardware costs.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一返回) >> Thought: The unemployed, they're willing to work for peanuts. Quentin Qiu: We call these people "flop contributors", or "juicers", because, you know, they sell brain juice for money. Quentin Qiu: The business of this farm, or Vision Corp as a whole, is to power AI systems with the flops we generate. <<@穩哥可以跟你講其他知識喔>> Quentin Qiu: Ask Tyler if you want to know more.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比讚) >> Quentin Qiu: He deals with juicers. Tyler Cao: Oi, language.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭) >> Quentin Qiu: Chill. Edi can't hear us.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比讚返回) >>;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->What? Quentin Qiu: It's nothing. Quentin Qiu: Some consider the word "juicer" derogatory.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手) >> Quentin Qiu: It started as a neutral word. Calling a spade a spade. Brain juice sellers. Quentin Qiu: But over time, the term has collected plenty of negative suggestions. Piss-poor, for example.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->What do you think? Is it derogatory? Quentin Qiu: I say the word is innocent. Depends on how you intend to use it. Quentin Qiu: But certainly I understand some may feel uncomfortable. Quentin Qiu: Just try not to use it in public. Thought: Well, he just used it in public. <<#Simple(6)>> ->You just said the word "juicer" yourself. Quentin Qiu: Because I don't think you're one of those who mind. Quentin Qiu: I presume you are not one of them. <<#Simple(6)>> ->You presumed wrong. Quentin Qiu: Now I know for sure. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@聽著，我只會在會在意的人面前避免>> Quentin Qiu: I use the word, but not in front of those who mind.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一) >> Quentin Qiu: Everyone is happy that way, no? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I sense implicit classism. Quentin Qiu: ...;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一返回) >> Quentin Qiu: I see you're like Edi. Quentin Qiu: I'll add you to the avoid list, alright. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I didn't mean that. I don't mind you using the word. Quentin Qiu: Yeah? Just feeling uncomfortable? Quentin Qiu: For using the word in private... Quentin Qiu: You don't mean anything negative, but it still feels weird. Quentin Qiu: Especially, what if you're overheard, right? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I think no matter what the word means, the use of it facilitates classism. Quentin Qiu: Ah, I see where this is going. Philosophical. Quentin Qiu: Maybe save this conversation for another day. Don't have time right now. Quentin Qiu: I'm not like him, getting paid for doing nothing, like the company owes him.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭) >> Tyler Cao: Says the man who actually owes me.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭) >> Tyler Cao: $320. Fork it over! Quentin Qiu: Alright! I did! Check your account!;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回) >>;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回) >> ->Yeah, wouldn't want to be overheard. Quentin Qiu: I dig you. Quentin Qiu: Let's be extra careful about what we say.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手) >> Quentin Qiu: Don't mention the wrong thing to the wrong audience. Quentin Qiu: If you accidentally did, say sorry before it's too late.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> ->I don't want to limit your freedom of speech. Quentin Qiu: ... Quentin Qiu: There you are, asking me not to say something, then wanting me to exercise freedom of speech. Quentin Qiu: Alright, I'll try. Quentin Qiu: This is one heck of a paradox, though. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Could be. ->Yeah, I agree. Quentin Qiu: Great!;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> ->So, you think that word should be banned? Quentin Qiu: Yes, and no. <<#GoTo(@聽著，我只會在會在意的人面前避免)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I have no more questions. Quentin Qiu: Good.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回) >> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> Quentin Qiu: Anything else you want to know? <<#GoTo(@開始問球球問題)>>

title: 問穩哥問題
body: //判斷有沒有先問過對方 Tyler Cao: Hi. Can I help you?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站轉頭左) >> <<@問穩哥句句問題>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm wondering what exactly is screening for. ($AskTaiMinWhySelect) <> Tyler Cao: Because not every candidate is fit for service. Tyler Cao: There are physical reasons.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外抬手) >> Tyler Cao: Like the case Edith mentioned, drug abuse may increase the risk in flop contribution. Thought: How can we tell? We are not physicians.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Meaning we must be certified to practice as physicians? Tyler Cao: Ha! No such thing. Relax. <<#GoTo(@這不是應該讓專業的人檢查嘛)>> ->Aren't there professionals for that? Tyler Cao: There are. Medical examination is not part of our responsibilities. <<@這不是應該讓專業的人檢查嘛>> Tyler Cao: Everyone who comes to consultation has already done professional medical examination.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外轉頭) >> Tyler Cao: Our job is to find out those who have slipped through the system, by whatever means. Tyler Cao: Pay attention to those who are visibly unwell, or way too old.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外轉頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: Catching the unfit is half of your job. Tyler Cao: The other half is to select the most efficient contributors from all candidates. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Efficient? Tyler Cao: Yes. Generally, those who have survived tough life will make great contributors. Tyler Cao: With brains constantly under pressure, they tend to perform exceptionally well when racked. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: That sums it up. Screening is all about eliminating the unfit and prioritizing the fittest. Tyler Cao: Ms. Yeh wouldn't agree with it, though. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wouldn't agree? With what? Tyler Cao: With seeing candidates as a heap of records and figures instead of holistic humans.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外轉頭) >> Tyler Cao: And putting the company's interest before theirs. Tyler Cao: Didn't you feel that during your interview?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外轉頭返回) >> Tyler Cao: Must be tough being her, a humanist in a 100% data-driven age. ->Why is she still in this trade, then? Tyler Cao: Wants to change things, probably. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->For screening, do we really have to meet candidates in person? ($AskTaiMinWhyFace2Face) <> Tyler Cao: We must get to know them. Where they come from, what kind of environment they live in, etc.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外抬手) >> Tyler Cao: These things matter, as they affect the reliability and efficiency of contributors. Tyler Cao: Can't learn much without meeting candidates in person.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外抬手返回) >> Thought: But I already have everything I need to know in the computer? <<#Simple(6)>> ->I thought I had all the necessary information in my computer already? Tyler Cao: Some. Not all. Those files only show one side of them. Tyler Cao: You have what they want you to know, plus data pulled from all over the cyberspace by Vision's automated system.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外轉頭) >> Tyler Cao: Considering the type of people we regularly deal with – slum dwellers, with limited access to the cyberspace... Tyler Cao: I'll be surprised if Vision could find anything helpful at all. Tyler Cao: The situation is made worse by the fact that a lot of them are illegal immigrants, wiped from the citizen registration at their hometowns, and not registered at all in Wanpei.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外轉頭返回) >> Tyler Cao: Essentially, you're looking at the compiled records of people who don't exist. Tyler Cao: Ironic, isn't it? Heh. Thought: I think he feels for them. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: What we lack in data and records, we make up for it through consultation. Tyler Cao: By meeting them in person, we often find out critical details not documented in the records. Tyler Cao: That's basically it. ->How does a typical consultation session go? ($AskTaiMinHow2Face2Face) <>;<> Tyler Cao: Simple enough. Tyler Cao: Everything is streamlined for efficiency. They are told to start the conversation with a self introduction. Tyler Cao: Just hear them out, then ask your questions. Easy-peasy. Tyler Cao: The hard part is deciding whom we want to sign contracts with. Tyler Cao: Ah, talking about the session, you might want to know this. Tyler Cao: Sometimes they will offer to show you their ID.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外抬手) >> Tyler Cao: Thing is, everyone we meet has already been pre-identified by Silencio. Tyler Cao: Just tell them there's no need if they ask about ID.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外抬手返回) >> ->I have no more questions. Tyler Cao: OK.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外返回) >> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: Alright, anything else you want to know? <<#If($AskTaiMinOnceOk=false)>> <> <<#Simple(6)>> ->You have work to do, right? Tyler Cao: Ugh... The thing Edi talked about? Tyler Cao: Not a big deal. I have more than enough time! Tyler Cao: Mr. Liao can't be back so soon. He's out there helping Wayne out. Tyler Cao: Ask away! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#GoTo(@問穩哥句句問題)>> <<#End>>

title: 調查物件:新人報到通知
body: //裡面有說明現在大部份企業都是直接上網爬蟲收集資料，分析後自動錄取。很少會透過主管面試之類的了。 Thought: I received my notice for interview literally in a minute after sending out my job application. Thought: The way this system works is efficient but disorienting. I don't have the slightest idea what I'm supposed to do. Thought: The notice just said I'm invited to an interview for an "Ops" position. Thought: There was a fat package of brochures and zero instructions. Thought: I went through the whole stack and memorized as much as I could, just in case. Thought: They hardly told me anything about how I should prepare myself... Thought: Seriously, how did Vision decide I'm fit for the job...? <<#End>>

title: 面談_對象戴勇誠
body: <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Hello. ->Let's begin. <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: Hello. My name is Eugene Dai. *Fidgeting*;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> Thought: An awkward start. Eugene Dai: Phew! It's crazy hot here.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前) >> Thought: Apparently there is no air conditioning on the other side of this glass. Eugene Dai: Can't believe I'm finally here. Eugene Dai: Sent out my application back in March. March last year. Eugene Dai: Didn't hear nothing from your company ever since. Thought you didn't want me.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前扶額) >> Eugene Dai: And suddenly out of the blue, they told me to come here. Eugene Dai: ... Eugene Dai: Um, before anything, let me make this clear.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前扶額返回) >> Eugene Dai: I have to take care of something. Family emergency. Eugene Dai: Suppose you pick me at the end of the day, I may not be available right away. Eugene Dai: Do you still think we need to keep this consultation going?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure thing. Don't worry about it.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐點頭)>> <<@戴勇誠說這樣喔，那好……>> Eugene Dai: Okay... ->It could be a problem if you aren't available. Eugene Dai: Problem is, I'm not quite sure...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭) >> Eugene Dai: ... Eugene Dai: Maybe... Or maybe not?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm sorry, but you're free to go now. Eugene Dai: Okay... That much is settled, then. Eugene Dai: Really thank you for your time. <>;<<#End>> ->We can go on with the consultation. Leave that concern for later. <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠說這樣喔，那好……)>> ->Something happened? If it's not too nosy to ask? Eugene Dai: Don't feel like talking about it. Eugene Dai: Right. I should go. This is wasting your time. Sorry. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Wait. We can continue this session. It's not a problem. <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠說這樣喔，那好……)>> ->Have a nice day. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <>;<<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: Um, where shall I start?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐思考) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐轉筆) >> Eugene Dai: Let's start from the basics. Eugene Dai: I'm 49 years old. No wife, no kids, just my pa and myself, living outside Wanpei.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐思考返回) >> Eugene Dai: Used to live in Chiayu County before the reform. Moved over here a couple of years ago.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前) >> Eugene Dai: We had a little farm back there. I stayed home to work for my pa after high school. Eugene Dai: A few years down the road, I took it over from pa. Good old me, a business owner! Eugene Dai: Off the bat, things were not bad. We made okay-ish money from grains. Eugene Dai: Then I tried to grow this tough grass on the farm. Can't eat it, but good for braiding.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前抬手) >> Eugene Dai: So we made it into baskets, mats, and stuff, and sold them in the farm store. Eugene Dai: Pa liked the idea. We made it an ongoing business. Eugene Dai: But you know how it went back then. Agricultural factories were popping up everywhere...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前抬手返回) >> Eugene Dai: Ah, sorry I've been going on and on. My bad.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐待機) >> Eugene Dai: You have questions, don't you? Ask away. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Agricultural factories? What are those? Eugene Dai: Right. You folks in the city prolly don't care much about that. Eugene Dai: It's those factories growing crops and veggies inside. Don't need no farmer. <<@跟你說喔，真的是一棟一棟蓋不完。>> Eugene Dai: Man, they were really building them those days, hundreds of them. Eugene Dai: Nasty business, all that waste water and stinky gas. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You could file complaints about the pollution. Eugene Dai: Doesn't work. Got a thousand steps to file a complaint. <<@戴勇誠檢舉選項>> Eugene Dai: Even if we do file a complaint, there's a loooong waiting line. <<@跟你講啦，議員一定有收黑錢。>> Eugene Dai: You know what? The guv'nors must have taken their money and sided with them factories.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前手指) >> Eugene Dai: We voted, for what? For those good-for-nothing town reps to screw us over? Eh? Eugene Dai: What do you say, lad? Ever seen a town rep doing a good thing? Thought: Ah, politics...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前手指返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Certainly they must do something, if only to be re-elected? ->How did they become township representatives if they don't do a thing? Eugene Dai: Gus Hsie, he got elected alright!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前返回) >> Eugene Dai: Been a rep since I was in high school. Everyone voted for him. Eugene Dai: Everyone, myself included, never voted for anyone else! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Well, you get what you asked for. Thought: Hey! Why did I say that? <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠開始生氣但是因為玩家太嗆)>> ->Why vote for him? Eugene Dai: Or what? Vote for the other party? Eh?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抬手) >> Thought: He's getting agitated... Thought: When was the last time that a conversation about politics went well? Eugene Dai: Dirty, bribing, shameless weasels they are! Vote for them, huh?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->But you just said your own representative takes money from factories. Eugene Dai: He has to, OK? All those campaigns cost money!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾) >> Eugene Dai: The point is, the other party takes more money. Wouldn't you say so? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->How do you know? Eugene Dai: I just know, right? Eugene Dai: Tell you what, I know Gus is one good egg because I know him. Eugene Dai: He came to my nephew's wedding, alright? Eugene Dai: And brought some expensive gifts, too! Wouldn't you say he's a solid folk?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Personality has nothing to do with his integrity as a township representative. <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠開始生氣了。)>> ->Yeah, he sounds like a good guy.;<> Eugene Dai: Right? I had a couple of toasts with him there! Eugene Dai: My pa and him—;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭) >> Thought: Why the abrupt stop? Thought: He's like suddenly deflated. Eugene Dai: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Excuse me. Do you feel alright? ->Your father and the township representative...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: Nah, it's nothin'.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> Eugene Dai: Let's get back to the self introduction part. <<#GoTo(@政治暴氣結束回來面談)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I agree with you. Eugene Dai: You know this sort of thing. Eugene Dai: The other party? Not even a match!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->That is not fair. <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠開始生氣了。)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Eugene Dai: Alright! Enough politics talk for a day! Eugene Dai: Let's get back to the self introduction part. <<#GoTo(@政治暴氣結束回來面談)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->You're right.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: *Sigh* OK, enough politics. Eugene Dai: I'm in Wanpei now. Got to put those things behind. <<#GoTo(@政治暴氣結束回來面談)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: Alright! Enough politics talk for a day! Eugene Dai: Let's get back to the self introduction part. <<#GoTo(@政治暴氣結束回來面談)>> ->Please continue with the self introduction.;<> Eugene Dai: *Sigh* Right...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前返回) >> Eugene Dai: That's what we're here for today, ain't it? Self introduction, right... <<#GoTo(@政治暴氣結束回來面談)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Did you do anything about it? Eugene Dai: We swallowed it, is what we did. Eugene Dai: What else? File complaints? Ain't gonna work! <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠檢舉選項)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: The guv'nors didn't care. Eugene Dai: Why should they? The town reps were OK with it! <<#GoTo(@跟你講啦，議員一定有收黑錢。)>> ->Let's continue. Eugene Dai: Where were we? Oh, factories in my old town... <<#GoTo(@跟你說喔，真的是一棟一棟蓋不完。)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<@政治暴氣結束回來面談>> Eugene Dai: Anyway, the pollution got from bad to worse. Eugene Dai: Couldn't grow a thing on our farm. Couldn't even live there.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前) >> Eugene Dai: Small farms like us died out pretty soon. Either sell the land to factories or just kick the bucket.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐轉筆) >> Eugene Dai: You know what they say, life goes on. Eugene Dai: We sold the land on the cheap, and moved to Wanpei, looking to start over. Eugene Dai: Pa was supportive and all...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前扶額) >> Eugene Dai: But you know what it's like these days. Can't find no job. Eugene Dai: I ended up doing gig jobs here and there. Eugene Dai: Wanpei, huh. You city folks are a heartless bunch.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前扶額返回) >> Eugene Dai: Not you, lad. I mean them. Haven't seen a single kind soul. Eugene Dai: *Sigh* OK. That went far enough... Eugene Dai: You won't take offense when I talk about Wanpei like that, will you?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐待機) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Don't mind at all. Eugene Dai: Good to know.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前返回) >> Eugene Dai: You're a good egg, lad. Surely are. ->Will I? Eugene Dai: ... Eugene Dai: OK. <<#GoTo(@這樣講是我不對，原諒我說話直了些……)>> ->I do take offense.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐點頭) >> Eugene Dai: Ahem! Sorry. <<@這樣講是我不對，原諒我說話直了些……>> Eugene Dai: My bad. Shouldn't have been blunt like that...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐靠前返回) >> Eugene Dai: Pa always says I talk before I think. Eugene Dai: Anyway. Apologies. <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: Come to think about it, maybe it's all my own fault. Eugene Dai: Good for nothing, yet always blaming others. Eugene Dai: ...You heard plenty about it already.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾) >> Eugene Dai: I'm good for nothing, really. Eugene Dai: Can't get into college. Can't keep the farm.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐轉筆) >> Eugene Dai: And now, can't find a job. Eugene Dai: Pa got sick after we moved to Wanpei. It's my turn to support him but I just can't. Eugene Dai: Even so... Eugene Dai: I still believe in what pa told me...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾看手) >> Eugene Dai: "Work hard and get paid", he used to say all the time. Eugene Dai: I know I haven't got no real job right now. Eugene Dai: Still, I'm trying hard. Sooner or later, it will pay off.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐待機) >> Eugene Dai: Sorry, I'm giving you an earful about my pa.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾看手返回) >> Eugene Dai: ... Eugene Dai: He's a good man, my pa, a great man. Eugene Dai: He's the backbone of the family, always. Kept me well fed even in the hardest times. Eugene Dai: Can't do without him now that we're talking about my life... Eugene Dai: ...I've said too much more than you'd like to know, eh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No such thing. Thank you for sharing. Eugene Dai: You're awfully nice, lad. Eugene Dai: All this bad talk about Wanpei, outside the city it's about the same, I admit. Eugene Dai: People are made heartless, just to make a living. ->You went a bit off topic. Eugene Dai: Yeah. Sorry.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾返回) >> Eugene Dai: I kept on rambling. Eugene Dai: Got heady when I talked about family.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭) >> Eugene Dai: Now, that about wraps it up. Eugene Dai: ...I'm done with self introduction, prolly. Eugene Dai: If you have no more questions, I'll show myself out.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> Eugene Dai: Sorry for wasting your time. Eugene Dai: Goodbye. <>;<<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: ...I'm not much better, either.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾返回) >> Eugene Dai: Didn't have the heart to tell you, but the truth is... Eugene Dai: Pa tried to talk me out of it time and again, alright?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭) >> Eugene Dai: Still, I ended up a gangster, to make a living. Eugene Dai: Did my share of dirty work and hurt more than a few people... Eugene Dai: I mean, what else can I do? Eugene Dai: You know what life is like outside your posh industrial zones.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> Eugene Dai: Stinky air, foul water, dead bodies here and there.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐低頭) >> Eugene Dai: Killed, starved, overdosed. Eugene Dai: I think you city folks call it the Shithole. Eugene Dai: Can't blame you. It is what it is.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭) >> Eugene Dai: The whole Taihe District is one giant shithole full of germs and maggots. Eugene Dai: There I made money as a drug dealer. Also smuggled chemicals from factories.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐低頭返回) >> Eugene Dai: That lasted for about a year. Eugene Dai: Never mentioned a word to pa. Thought: He's on the verge of tears... Eugene Dai: OK. That's it.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> Eugene Dai: Sorry for trying to keep that part hidden. Eugene Dai: Heh... Eugene Dai: Looking back, I'm a terrible, terrible person... <<#Simple(8)>> ->I wouldn't say so. Eugene Dai: What kind of person would you say I am, then? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->A man who did what he had to for survival. ->A man who has tried. Eugene Dai: ... Eugene Dai: Thank you. Eugene Dai: Thank you for the kind words. Eugene Dai: I haven't seen any kindness for a very long time.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾) >> Eugene Dai: Nowadays I just... Eugene Dai: ...just keep going.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾看手) >> Eugene Dai: I know what a loser I am. Eugene Dai: Always complaining, about the world, about other people... Eugene Dai: Turns out I'm one of them, too. Eugene Dai: Not any better...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾看手返回) >> <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠好結局)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I feel uncomfortable about what you have done. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: Heh...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低落) >> Eugene Dai: Always complaining, about the world, about other people... Eugene Dai: Turns out I'm one of them, too. Eugene Dai: Not any better... Eugene Dai: Thank you, lad.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低落返回) >> Eugene Dai: For not kicking me out yet, haha... Eugene Dai: I guess our conversation ends here. Eugene Dai: Forget about me. Prolly won't come back. Eugene Dai: Sorry for wasting your time. Eugene Dai: Goodbye.;<< PlayUntil (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐) >> <>;<<#End>> <<@戴勇誠好結局>> Eugene Dai: You know what? Eugene Dai: Pa died. Today. Eugene Dai: He got sicker and sicker, but I didn't have the money for medicine. Eugene Dai: Then you guys called, telling me to come here. I thought...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐後傾返回) >> Eugene Dai: Well, got a phone call just before I came in, telling me pa's gone. Eugene Dai: ...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低落) >> Eugene Dai: Give this opportunity to someone else, maybe. Eugene Dai: Everything I did since coming to Wanpei was to make pa get better. Eugene Dai: Rushing from gig to gig, always looking for a real job... Eugene Dai: Now that he's gone, what's the point?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低落偷哭) >> Eugene Dai: Even if you sign me on, I have no use for the money anymore. Eugene Dai: Prolly buy myself a ticket to the hometown? Eugene Dai: There should be some relatives, working in factories.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低落偷哭返回) >> Eugene Dai: Thank you, lad, really. Eugene Dai: Being here, saying it out loud, makes me feel a little better.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低落返回) >> Eugene Dai: You take care. Bye. Thought: ... <>;<<#End>>

title: 主角第一次使用電腦對話
body:
<<Set($DLState,開始底一次使用電腦對畫畫)>>
Computer: Welcome to the home screen. Current user - Jason Dai.
<<@退回主畫面了喔！>>
Computer: What would you like to do?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->[Work schedule]
    Computer: Your next task is [consultation]. Please wait for further instructions from the Screening team lead.
    Computer: Meanwhile, you may examine candidate profiles.
    <<@看看要看誰的資料PUIPUI>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->[Examine - Eugene Dai]
        <<Set($PCCheckEveryInterviewPerson1, true)>>
        Computer: Registration - N/A (likely Zone 17)
        Computer: Gender - Male (49)
        Computer: Description - Unmarried. No history of mental issues. Slightly malnourished.
        Computer: Fitness score - 7/10
    ->[Examine - Yvonne Chiang]
        <<Set($PCCheckEveryInterviewPerson2, true)>>
        Computer: Registration - Wanpei
        Computer: Gender - Female (25)
        Computer: Description - Unmarried. History of mild depression. Physically well.
        Computer: Fitness score - 9/10
    ->[Examine - Sydney Tung]    
        <<Set($PCCheckEveryInterviewPerson3, true)>>
        Computer: Registration - Wanpei
        Computer: Gender - Female (22)
        Computer: Description - Unmarried. No history of mental issues. Perfect health.
        Computer: Fitness score - 10/10
    ->[Examine - Hank Liu]
        <<Set($PCCheckEveryInterviewPerson4, true)>>
        Computer: Registration - Wanpei
        Computer: Gender - Male (59)
        Computer: Description - Unmarried. Slight bipolar disorder. Symptoms of overexertion.
        Computer: Fitness score - 6/10
    ->[Back to Home]
        <<#GoTo(@退回主畫面了喔！)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
 
    
    Computer: Do you wish to examine more candidate profiles?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Yes.
        Computer: Please select.
        <<#GoTo(@看看要看誰的資料PUIPUI)>>
    ->No.
        Computer: Return to home screen.
        <<#GoTo(@退回主畫面了喔！)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->[Database]
    <<@看看要看啥鬼資料>>
    Computer: What data would you like to retrieve?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->[Farm operation status]
        Computer: "Farm Silencio is currently working at capacity - 84.21%"
        Computer: Current online contributors - 121,478
    ->[My status]
        Computer: Your position is - Employee on probation
    ->[Back to Home]
        <<#GoTo(@退回主畫面了喔！)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Computer: Do you wish to retrieve any other data?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Yes.
        Computer: Please select.
        <<#GoTo(@看看要看啥鬼資料)>>
    ->No.
        Computer: Return to home screen.
        <<#GoTo(@退回主畫面了喔！)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->[Security clearance]
    Computer: You're authorized to access the following region(s) - Vision Flop Farm 003 "Silencio", upper levels
    Computer: Not authorized within these regions - 1) Tech Center. 2) Logistics Office. 3) Consultation Lobby.
    Computer: Return to home screen.
    <<#GoTo(@退回主畫面了喔！)>>
->[Log out]
<<#EndSimple>>
 
 
//判斷是否所有人的資料都看過
<<#If($PCCheckEveryInterviewPerson1 = true)>>
    <<#If($PCCheckEveryInterviewPerson2 = true)>>
        <<#If($PCCheckEveryInterviewPerson3 = true)>>
            <<#If($PCCheckEveryInterviewPerson4 = true)>>
            Thought: Finished doing my homework.
            Thought: Should ask them how much longer I have to wait.
            <<Set($DLState,阿緯可以進場啦！)>>
            <<#End>>
            <<#EndIf>>    
        <<#EndIf>>    
    <<#EndIf>>    
<<#EndIf>>
<<Set($DLState,主角第一次使用電腦對話結束)>>
<<#End>>

title: 跟阿緯說自己準備好去面談了
body:
<<#Simple(8)>>
->I'm ready for consultation.
    Wayne Zheng: Great!;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐起身) >>
    <<#If($ToldAWeiYouHadReadIt = false)>>
        Wayne Zheng: How about a quiz before we start?
        Wayne Zheng: I have gone through the profiles, too. Today's consultation is going to be very easy!
        Wayne Zheng: There's a perfect candidate with 10/10 score. You know who I'm talking about?
        Thought: I can't afford to get this wrong...
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Hank Liu.
        ->Yvonne Chiang.
        ->Eugene Dai.
            Wayne Zheng: Hmm? I don't think that's the correct answer.
            Wayne Zheng: It's Ms. Sydney Tung.
            Wayne Zheng: A bit extra preparation won't hurt, Jason!
            Thought: Hopefully I didn't make too much a fool of myself...
        ->Sydney Tung.
            Wayne Zheng: Bingo!
            Wayne Zheng: You have done your homework very well. Great!
            Thought: Yay! One more point for me!
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    Wayne Zheng: Let's go.
    <<Set($DLState,跟阿緯說自己準備好面拉拉嚕嘿)>>;<<#End>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 進面談大廳遇到何歆翊
body:
Cynthia Ho: Oh hi, Wayne!
Wayne Zheng: ...!?
Wayne Zheng: C-Cyndi! Hi! Wasn't expecting to see you here.
Thought: You're blushing all over, dude.
Thought: Now I think I know who his crush is.
Cynthia Ho: Not expecting? QQ asked me to come over and help.;<< Play (何歆翊, MBU_何歆翊_側站插腰) >>
Cynthia Ho: Apparently the server in the lobby needs a fix again, and he's too busy to do it.
Cynthia Ho: Consider hiring someone. Calling Logistics for help isn't a solution.;<< Play (何歆翊, MBU_何歆翊_側站插腰抬手) >>
Cynthia Ho: I'm happy enough to visit you guys every once in a while, though.
Thought: QQ didn't seem busy at all.
Cynthia Ho: Ah, he said you were looking for me?;<< Play (何歆翊, MBU_何歆翊_側站插腰抬手返回) >>
Cynthia Ho: Huh? What is it?
Wayne Zheng: I, uh...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站駝背) >>
Wayne Zheng: I was planning to...;<< Play (何歆翊, MBU_何歆翊_側站插腰返回) >>

<<#Simple(10)>>
->He's planning to ask you out.;<<Set($DLStateFloat,146)>>;<<Set($PushChunWeiToAskHerOut,true)>>

    Cynthia Ho: What?;<< Play (何歆翊, MBU_何歆翊_側站舉手放下) >>

    Cynthia Ho: Wayne?

->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Cynthia Ho: Sorry! Forgot to introduce myself.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站駝背返回) >>
Cynthia Ho: I'm Cynthia Ho. Nice to meet you.

<<#Simple(99999)>>

title: 小緯最後解釋面談流程
body: Wayne Zheng: This is the consultation lobby, where the last step of screening happens. Thought: Much bigger than I thought. Wayne Zheng: Now, pay attention, Jason. Today you're on field practice, nothing intensive.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰) >> Wayne Zheng: Next, you will have consultation sessions with four candidates, and select one from them as a contributor. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Select. Based on what? Wayne Zheng: I'm not in a position to disclose that. Sorry.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Will explain later on. Wayne Zheng: Let me walk you through the routine first.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: The candidates know what they are required to do. They will start the conversation with a self introduction. Wayne Zheng: We decide who makes the best contributor based on what we learn from it. Wayne Zheng: Listen carefully, ask questions, learn as much about them as possible.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: After all four sessions, go find Ms. Yeh and tell her your decision. Wayne Zheng: Then comes the signing of contract, to seal the deal. I will walk you through that, too. Wayne Zheng: Now, the important part.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰抬手返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Finding out who is not fit is the bare minimum. Wayne Zheng: If you really want this job, do better than that.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰手指) >> Wayne Zheng: Meaning you must find out who is the fittest. Wayne Zheng: Of course, you have no idea what makes one fit or unfit. Wayne Zheng: This is the point of field practice, to see if you can figure things out on the fly.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰手指返回) >> Wayne Zheng: ...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰思考) >> Wayne Zheng: I will give you some hint, but never, ever, mention this to Ms. Yeh, will you? Thought: Meaning he's willing to break the rules to help me?;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰思考返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->You mean, she told you to not give any hint? Wayne Zheng: Yeah.;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰點頭) >> Wayne Zheng: I'd be so dead if she knew I'm doing this. Haha… <<#Simple(10)>> ->These lips are sealed. Wayne Zheng: Good. Here it comes. ->Don't give me hints, then. Wayne Zheng: Are you sure? Wayne Zheng: Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because she may consider me cheating. Wayne Zheng: Don't worry. The liability is all mine. Wayne Zheng: But now that you've turned down the offer, guess I should comply. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I changed my mind. Hint, please? Wayne Zheng: Haha, no problem. ->Yeah, let's not do that. <<#GoTo(@緯緯不提示主角嚕)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I don't want to put you under risk. Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Makes sense.;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰點頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Thank you. I'll skip the hint, then. <<#GoTo(@緯緯不提示主角嚕)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: With field practice, she wants to see how you operate on insufficient data.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰手指) >> Wayne Zheng: You may want to take everything into consideration before making the big decision. Wayne Zheng: For example, instead of reporting to Ms. Yeh right away... Wayne Zheng: You may ask colleagues who have done consultation for additional input.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰手指返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Tyler, Jeff, to name a few. Wayne Zheng: Of course, they may not want to help. Wayne Zheng: But you never know without asking first. Right? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Would you like to offer some extra input, please? Wayne Zheng: Haha, testing the boundaries already. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Ahem! So much for hints. <<@緯緯不提示主角嚕>> Wayne Zheng: Now you may start your sessions.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Jeff will take over your booth when all four are done. Thought: Jeff? Thought: Ah, the guy we met at the elevator. Wayne Zheng: The guy we met just now, remember?;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站抓頭) >> Wayne Zheng: OK. That's it. Good luck!;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站抓頭返回) >> <<#End>>

<<#End>>

title: 戴勇誠政治爆氣
body: /////////////////////////////////////////////進到這裡代表政治話題已經太超過了 <<@戴勇誠開始生氣了。>> <> Eugene Dai: Oi, what's your problem, eh?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸) >> Thought: Great. Now he's all flared up. Eugene Dai: Why do you take their side? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm not taking sides. Eugene Dai: You keep talking crap about our rep, didn't ya?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸抬頭) >> Eugene Dai: That's siding with them alright? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You told me he's been taking bribery, remember? ->Saying he's bad doesn't mean I think the other party is good. <<@講是都這樣講啦！>> Eugene Dai: So you say!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸抬頭返回) >> Eugene Dai: Admit it! You're one of them! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm really not. This is a misunderstanding. Eugene Dai: What's your problem, then, talking crap about our rep, huh??;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸返回) >> Thought: Damn. This conversation is going nowhere... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You talked crap about him first. ->I just wanted to point out that you're contradicting yourself. <<@你支持他，然後又抱怨沒人做事>> Eugene Dai: I, um... <<#Simple(8)>> ->You know he's not doing his job and still vote for him? ->You know better than anyone else that he's not a good rep, man. Eugene Dai: What else can I do, huh?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抬手) >> Eugene Dai: Say, what if I voted for the other party? Eugene Dai: As if it's any better!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Giving one of them a cheap vote only encourages it to do worse. ->You could say all politicians are corrupted weasels. Eugene Dai: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->As a voter, you have your own responsibility, which is to keep an eye on the people you voted for. ->Don't complain about people not doing their job when you are not doing yours. Eugene Dai: ...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭) >> Thought: Man, why did I get so serious about it? This is so off the subject.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐抬頭) >> Thought: Although I don't think I said anything wrong. Eugene Dai: You have a point, prolly...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> Eugene Dai: Truth be told, I knew Mr. Hsieh is no good rep.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐抬頭返回) >> Eugene Dai: Still, I can't vote for the other party. As if I had any choice... Eugene Dai: Every man's on his own. Can't trust anybody at the end of the day.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐挺胸) >> Eugene Dai: Me? Every day's work, work, more work. Ain't got no time for politics. Eugene Dai: Yeah, we're wasting time here, talking about politics.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐挺胸抬雙手) >> Thought: What? Eugene Dai: I mean, politicians do what they do. We nobodies have no say in it.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐挺胸抬雙手返回) >> Thought: You started this awfully long talk and now you're calling it a waste of time? Eugene Dai: Just complaining for complaining's sake...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐挺胸低頭) >> Eugene Dai: Sorry, where was I again? Went too far before I knew it. Eugene Dai: My bad.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐挺胸低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->It's OK. I was a bit too blunt, too. Eugene Dai: Water under the bridge, lad.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐挺胸返回) >> ->Don't try to dodge the argument when you're losing. Eugene Dai: What the... What you want?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐挺胸返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I want you to admit that you're ignorant. ->I want you to think twice before talking about something you don't really understand. Eugene Dai: What's your problem? I said sorry, didn't I?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指) >> Eugene Dai: Enough of this crap! Eugene Dai: Can't stand you anymore. I'm going.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> <<#GoTo(@所以你不想面談是不是啦？)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: Let's get back to consultation, then. <<#GoTo(@政治暴氣結束回來面談)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: *Sigh* Okay, okay! Eugene Dai: Can't reason with you youngsters. What do you care? Thought: I've had enough of oldster talks like this...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭) >> Eugene Dai: You'll learn out there in the real world. Eugene Dai: Not my job teaching you the basics. Eugene Dai: Let's get back to consultation.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->No need. Show yourself out. Eugene Dai: What?!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指) >> Eugene Dai: Good. Great! Eugene Dai: I'm getting out of here! You have a bad day, sir!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@政治暴氣結束回來面談)>> ->What if I am taking their side? Eugene Dai: Well, I ain't gonna waste my breath on you anymore.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸返回) >> <<@所以你不想面談是不是啦？>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Meaning you want to end this session? Eugene Dai: ...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭) >> Thought: He's hesitating. Eugene Dai: Yeah, right! Maybe I didn't want to do this to begin with! Eugene Dai: That's it! I'm done!;<< PlayUntil (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐低頭返回) >> <>;<<#End>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eugene Dai: I'm getting out of here! You have a bad day, sir! <>;<<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Sounds like you're supporting a crappy party. Thought: Hey! Why did I say that?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸抬頭返回) >>;<< PlayUntil (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸返回) >> <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠開始生氣但是因為玩家太嗆)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I just don't understand why you keep voting for a bad man. Eugene Dai: What do you mean by bad man? Didn't I say he's a good egg?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸返回) >> Eugene Dai: Who are we, huh? Nobodies! Still, he came in person when we had a wedding going. Eugene Dai: Did you get to see the rep you voted for, huh? Ever talked to him?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指) >> Thought: Well, no and no... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Never. Eugene Dai: Ha!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> <<#GoTo(@你自己一票一票投出來的議員欸！)>> ->Does that matter? Eugene Dai: You tell me.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> <<@你自己一票一票投出來的議員欸！>> Eugene Dai: You voted for your rep! Eugene Dai: How do you know he's doing his job when you can't even see him? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Seeing him on a wedding party definitely means he's not doing his job. Eugene Dai: You... Eugene Dai: That's nonsense... <<#Simple(6)>> ->Admit it. You voted without thinking. <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠開始生氣但是因為玩家太嗆)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@你支持他，然後又抱怨沒人做事)>> ->I don't need to see him in person to know what he's been working on. Eugene Dai: Ugh...;<< PlayUntil (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸) >> Eugene Dai: You're one heck of a talker, ain't you!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸抬頭) >> <<#GoTo(@講是都這樣講啦！)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Why do you vote for crappy reps, anyway? Thought: Hey! Why did I say that?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐抱胸返回) >> <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠開始生氣但是因為玩家太嗆)>> <<#EndSimple>> /////////////////////////////////////////////進到這裡代表政治話題已經太超過了 <<@戴勇誠開始生氣但是因為玩家太嗆>> <> Eugene Dai: You take that back! Now!;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I want you to calm down and actually think for a moment. Eugene Dai: About what, huh? Eugene Dai: What do you think if I'm insulting you like that, huh? <<#Simple(8)>> ->I must apologize. Sorry for being so mean. Eugene Dai: ...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> Eugene Dai: Hmph. Thought: He's calming down a little. Eugene Dai: Can't a man vote for the party he likes, eh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You sure can. Eugene Dai: Then what's your problem? <<#GoTo(@你支持他，然後又抱怨沒人做事)>> ->But if this party happens to be a corrupted mess, there's a problem. Eugene Dai: Corrupted or not, who's the judge? Eugene Dai: You?;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Maybe not me but definitely not you. You're totally clueless. Eugene Dai: Enough.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠爆氣離開面談)>> ->No, it's yourself. You said your rep takes bribery. Eugene Dai: ...;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> <<#GoTo(@你支持他，然後又抱怨沒人做事)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I didn't mean it. Eugene Dai: Enough.;<< Play (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> <<#GoTo(@戴勇誠爆氣離開面談)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Sure thing. Shall I take back your candidate qualification, too, while I'm at it? ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@戴勇誠爆氣離開面談>> Eugene Dai: You know what? I shouldn't have come here. Eugene Dai: You spoiled, fancy city bastards...;<< PlayUntil (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指) >> Eugene Dai: You have no idea how hard this world is. Eugene Dai: You have a bad day, sir. Thought: What am I doing...;<< PlayUntil (戴勇誠, MBU_戴勇誠_側坐手指返回) >> Thought: Why did I screw this up...? <>;<<#End>>

title: 面談_對象蔣瑜涵
body: <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Hello. ->Let's begin. <<#EndSimple>> Yvonne Chiang: Good day, sir. My legal name is Yvonne Chiang. C-h-i-a-n-g.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐轉筆) >> Yvonne Chiang: First name, Yvonne with an E. Yvonne Chiang: And double N. Yvonne Chiang: And... And thank you so much for giving me this opportunity.;<< Play (蔣瑜涵, MBU_蔣瑜涵_側坐抬頭返回) >> Thought: Doesn't take an expert to tell she's nervous...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐待機) >> Thought: No, anxious is the right word... Yvonne Chiang: ... Yvonne Chiang: Ah, right!;<< Play (蔣瑜涵, MBU_蔣瑜涵_側坐抬頭) >> Yvonne Chiang: I brought these with me... Yvonne Chiang: ID, social security, and driver's license. Yvonne Chiang: I thought you need to see the original copies of these after this session, no? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You're right.;<>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐點頭) >> Yvonne Chiang: Great! A bit extra preparation doesn't hurt. Yvonne Chiang: Just in case, I brought all my ID papers with me, haha...;<< Play (蔣瑜涵, MBU_蔣瑜涵_側坐抬頭返回) >> ->Actually, there's no need. ($ChouTaiMinSaidNoNeedID);<>;////////////有問過曹泰銘才解鎖？可以加個想法，說好險曹泰銘有提過。 Yvonne Chiang: I see... Yvonne Chiang: Sorry, I must have remembered it wrong...;<< Play (蔣瑜涵, MBU_蔣瑜涵_側坐抬頭返回) >> Yvonne Chiang: Um... Shouldn't have brought this whole pack of ID papers.
