My life—;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐後傾) >> Hank Liu: ... Hank Liu: Ha, my life doesn't matter to them, anyway.;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐後傾返回) >> ->Looks like you're eligible for the employee incentive program.;<> Hank Liu: What?? I get extra pay for that?;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐前傾) >> Hank Liu: Damn! It's about time to settle the score! Hank Liu: I'm gonna apply for that, even if it kills me, ha!;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Ahem! For that, we will need to see proof of employment. Hank Liu: Oh, I can dig around for it when I get back home...;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Hank Liu: Might have chucked it when they fired me.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Hank Liu: But good news is good news. Hank Liu: My mom's bills are paid, pretty much. Hank Liu: Now the only concern is my own safety. Wayne Zheng: You mean...? Hank Liu: I heard there's risk in flop contribution, no?;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐抬手) >> Hank Liu: They say, I reckon, there's a chance of injury? Wayne Zheng: ...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐思考) >>;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> Thought: What's wrong with Wayne? He looks kind of...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內) >> Thought: Nervous? Wayne Zheng: Technically, yes. There is risk. Wayne Zheng: Be assured, though, that the risk is practically negligible.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐思考返回) >> Hank Liu: I'll trust you on that.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內返回) >>;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐點頭) >> Hank Liu: I'm the only breadwinner in the whole family, you know.;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐低頭) >> Hank Liu: If I'm down, there's no safety net, no insurance... Thought: Having no insurance makes him eligible for yet another benefit... Thought: We provide free insurance coverage for uninsured contributors. Hank Liu: Tsk. Tough life, eh?;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(15)>> ->I'm sorry to hear that. Hank Liu: Don't be. Life ain't easy on anyone these days, right? ->Well, there's nothing you can do about it.;<> Hank Liu: Right... ->You know what? We can provide free insurance coverage.;<> Hank Liu: Really? Free, as in free of charge?;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐前傾) >> Wayne Zheng: Yes, provided you do not have any active insurance policy right now.;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐點頭) >> Hank Liu: Count me in. Don't have any kind of insurance on me. Wayne Zheng: I see. After signing this contract, please visit the Administrative Division for insurance application. Hank Liu: Lemme make a note of that.;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Hank Liu: OK. I'm ready to sign, I guess. Wayne Zheng: Good. Signature here, please. << PlayUntil (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_開啟) >>;<< Play (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_點擊) >>;<< PlayUntil (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐簽名) >> Hank Liu: Done. Thank you, Mr. Cheng and Mr. Dai. //先判斷最後有沒有介紹加給，兩個以上進這段對話 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold >1)>> Hank Liu: Especially you, Mr. Dai... Hank Liu: You helped me a lot with those extra bonuses. Hank Liu: I may actually get my life back on track! Thought: ... Hank Liu: ... Hank Liu: I know...;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐放心) >> //$FinalCheckBotherEnd 主角家怎麼選的 ( -1 = 沒吵過架 : >-1 = 吵過架 ) <<#If($FinalCheckBotherEnd >-1)>> Hank Liu: Not after that episode at your apartment. <<#EndIf>> //$EndingOfLiuHanMin 劉漢銘結局: 1把他氣走、2沒把他趕走 <<#If($EndingOfLiuHanMin = 1)>> Hank Liu: After the fight we had earlier today. <<#EndIf>> Hank Liu: You have no reason to like me, really. Hank Liu: Still, you told me about all these bonuses. Hank Liu: I'm not stupid, you know? You didn't have to mention any of it. I can tell that much. Hank Liu: ...And doing this will maybe make you look bad. Hank Liu: Piss-poor as I am, I can't do anything for you, not right now. Hank Liu: So, the least I can do is a cheap thank you. Hank Liu: Thank you.;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_簽約側坐放心返回) >> Hank Liu: ... Hank Liu: That's about it. Hank Liu: Nice seeing you gentlemen. See you around. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Goodbye. Hank Liu: ... Hank Liu: Thank you for everything. ->I'd rather not see you around.;<> Hank Liu: ... Hank Liu: Huh... Hank Liu: Yes, let's not meet again. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> Hank Liu: That settles that, then. Hank Liu: Have a nice evening and see you around. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm happy enough to not see you again. Hank Liu: ... Hank Liu: Right... ->Goodbye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>>

title: 鄭緯評價跟劉漢銘的簽約
body: //你剛剛做的決定很好，雖然你的第一次合約效益就這麼差，這樣公司系統會評價不讓你錄取，你很可能會被辭退。但是我很欣賞， //我會努力推薦你的，相信經理知道你的做法也會認同你的。起碼你不是拒簽，拒簽的話就糟了。我跟經理都不一定能救你。 //中間阿偉出去劉主角一個人應對阿姨說碧謙的人 //然後下一個人進來明顯不適合，會死又是貪財。主角想法也會不停提到。 Wayne Zheng: ... Thought: What's Wayne thinking? //壞態度三個以上 <<#If($LiuHanMinContractMeanCount > 3)>> Wayne Zheng: I must say, that you were not nice to him. Thought: *Sigh*;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Something happened between you guys? <<#If($FinalCheckBotherEnd > -1)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He came to my place earlier today to pick a fight.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: ... <<#GoTo(@明明跟劉漢漢有恩怨還裝傻)>> ->Nothing.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Huh... <<#GoTo(@明明跟劉漢漢有恩怨還裝傻)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#If($EndingOfLiuHanMin = 1)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He called me unprofessional, among other things, during consultation.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Huh... <<#GoTo(@明明跟劉漢漢有恩怨還裝傻)>> ->Nothing.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Huh... <<#GoTo(@明明跟劉漢漢有恩怨還裝傻)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I just don't like him. Plain and simple.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Is that so? ->Not nice? Was I?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: I saw what you did back there. <<#EndSimple>> <<@明明跟劉漢漢有恩怨還裝傻>> Wayne Zheng: It's unprofessional, and you know that, right? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'll pay more attention. Wayne Zheng: Good.;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐點頭) >> ->I know but I just can't help. ->I don't think it's a problem. Wayne Zheng: ...My personal opinion is that you are probably not cut out for this line of work. <<#Simple(6)>> ->I'll do better. Wayne Zheng: Hmm, good...;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐點頭) >> Thought: He doesn't sound very convinced. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> //補助說兩個以上 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold > 1)>> Wayne Zheng: Despite that... <<#GoTo(@不爽劉和和然後接補助話題)>> <<#EndIf>> //補助沒說兩個以上 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold < 2)>> Wayne Zheng: And... <<#GoTo(@不爽劉和和然後接補助沒說夠多話題)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> //沒有壞態度 <<#GoTo(@沒有不爽劉和和然後接補助話題)>> //補助有說兩個以上 ////不爽路線 <<@不爽劉和和然後接補助話題>> Wayne Zheng: You still chose to inform him of incentive programs. <<#GoTo(@不爽劉漢銘鄭緯說主角知道自己這樣很犧牲吧)>> ////沒不爽路線 <<@沒有不爽劉和和然後接補助話題>> <<#If($WhatBenefitTold > 1)>> Wayne Zheng: Jason, you told him way more than you should. <<@不爽劉漢銘鄭緯說主角知道自己這樣很犧牲吧>> Wayne Zheng: This will look very ugly, reflected in your performance review. Are you aware of that?;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Thought: I, um...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: If it goes far enough, the system may decide to not hire you. Wayne Zheng: I'm talking about more than Screening. You chance at Ops could be blown, too.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> <<#If($InterviewHandleBadCount>1)>> Thought: Ms. Yeh has made it very clear... Thought: Screening is already a dead end for me. I can't afford to lose Ops, too... <<#EndIf>> Thought: Why did I go so far out of my way to help him, anyway? Thought: Nah, can't take back a done deal now...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Wait... Wayne Zheng: Don't tell me you didn't know that giving him too many bonuses could cost you your job? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Well, I didn't know. ->I suspected, but wasn't sure. Wayne Zheng: Ah... Wayne Zheng: What do we do now? Things are really not looking good for you. ->I know.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐點頭) >> Wayne Zheng: You went ahead, despite knowing what it means? <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: If you're having second thoughts, there is one last chance.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> Wayne Zheng: You can have this contract submitted right away, before he has a chance to apply for bonuses. Wayne Zheng: In that case, timing is the key. You must beat him to it. Wayne Zheng: I can tell Edith to submit his contract right away, pronto. Wayne Zheng: Your job, your call. What would you say?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Thought: I really need this job... Thought: Again, he really needs those bonuses, too... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Let's play by the book. I believe I'm doing the right thing. Wayne Zheng: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: I see that you have made up your mind.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Anyway, unfavorable terms are better than no contract at all. That would be catastrophic. ->This is not fair to Mr. Liu, but let's submit the contract now. <> Wayne Zheng: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: I see...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->What do you think? Should I? Wayne Zheng: My opinion doesn't matter. Wayne Zheng: This is about your job and Mr. Liu's life. I don't have a stake in it.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐思考) >> Wayne Zheng: Life is tough. Everyone's out for themselves. Wayne Zheng: Can't blame others for not giving a hand. They have no reason to. Wayne Zheng: I won't judge you when it's your interest that is at stake.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐思考返回) >> Thought: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I will let Edith know, soon. <<#GoTo(@阿緯針對劉漢銘簽約過程基本評審結束)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#If($WhatBenefitTold < 2)>> //補助沒說兩個以上 <<@不爽劉和和然後接補助沒說夠多話題>> Wayne Zheng: Actually, you had plenty of chances to inform him of incentive packages... <<#If($WhatBenefitTold = 1)>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I did give him one. Wayne Zheng: But you could have offered more? <<#GoTo(@啊不蘭你是要我丟工作逆)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: Why not? <<@啊不蘭你是要我丟工作逆>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Giving him too good a deal would ruin my own performance review. I must find a balance. Wayne Zheng: Makes sense. I'd do the same if I were you... <<@有沒有但是啊娓娓>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I sense there's a but coming? Wayne Zheng: No, no but. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Life is tough. Everyone's out for themselves.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐思考) >> Wayne Zheng: Can't blame others for not giving a hand. They have no reason to. Wayne Zheng: I won't judge you when it's your interest that is at stake. Thought: ...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐思考返回) >> ->He's not worth it. Wayne Zheng: You really think so? Wayne Zheng: I can tell he genuinely needs any bonus he could get. Don't you think so? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Between need and worth, there's a difference. Wayne Zheng: I see what you mean. ->Maybe. But I can't help him at my own cost. Wayne Zheng: Understood. <<#GoTo(@有沒有但是啊娓娓)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<@阿緯針對劉漢銘簽約過程基本評審結束>> Wayne Zheng: OK. Time for the next candidate. Wayne Zheng: You know what? I can't sit through this session. Sorry. Have work to do. Wayne Zheng: After Mr. Liu, you should be able to handle it on your own. Thought: ... //簽約時所有規則全都記住才會進來這條線，鄭緯走了一段突然回頭。假的啦哈哈 <<#If($RememberContractDetailCount = 2)>> Wayne Zheng: Oh. Wayne Zheng: I was surprised that you knew about the 25% payment advance.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> Wayne Zheng: Few new employees, if any, are aware of fine details like that. Wayne Zheng: On top of that, you also knew we can't reduce a contributor's pay to below 85%. Wayne Zheng: Now I'm confident to say you are more than capable of this job. Wayne Zheng: I don't know if it makes any difference, but...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Wayne Zheng: I'll make sure Ms. Yeh hears about it. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Thank you. Wayne Zheng: No biggie. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Good luck with the next contract! <<#EndIf>> <<#End>>

title: 張可霖走進簽約室
body:
Karin Chang: *Chuckle*... Hi, yo!
Thought: What's with this weirdo vibe?
Thought: This is Ms. Yeh's must-sign-them-on candidate?
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Hello.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Karin Chang: I sit here? There? Where?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Right there. Please have a seat.
    Karin Chang: *Giggle* Okaaaay.
->Excuse me. Do you feel alright?
    Karin Chang: All. Right. Hahaha!
    Karin Chang: Not all wrong at all. Hee hee.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 跟張可霖簽約
body: //要回頭補拒簽合約的危險性 //要強調吸毒者榨腦會死，但不用拒絕 Karin Chang: Do I sign...where? Thought: She's shivering. Karin Chang: I'm signing the contract, no? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->If you have any questions about the contract, now is the time to ask. ->Yes. Please sign. Karin Chang: Waiwaiwai-wait...;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐很冷) >> Karin Chang: Can you turn the heat up a bit? Karin Chang: I'm, sorta, shivering all over the place, haha... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: She's cold?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐抬頭) >> Thought: Right now the room is very warm. Karin Chang: Please? Make it warmer? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->But it's fairly warm already. Karin Chang: Make it warm-ER!;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐抬頭返回) >> Karin Chang: What's your problem! Heat it up!;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐很冷返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Please calm down. Karin Chang: I AM CALM! Karin Chang: I'm... ->What's your problem? Karin Chang: I said—! Thought: Is she high on something...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Sorry, no can do. Automatic thermostat. Karin Chang: Wow, fancy. No can do, then.;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐很冷返回) >> Karin Chang: I'll ch-ch-chill for a while...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐抬頭返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: *Urk*;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐乾嘔) >> Thought: She's retching now. Thought: Wait. All these symptoms adding up... Karin Chang: Sorry, feeling sick. Karin Chang: Let's sign this thing then I'll be out of here.;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐乾嘔返回) >> Karin Chang: Where do I need to sign? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Are you sure that you have no questions? Karin Chang: What questions? Karin Chang: Should I? ->What you need is a doctor, miss. Karin Chang: Me? Doctor? Karin Chang: No! Why? Karin Chang: You're funny. Hee hee. Karin Chang: Doctors... Funny, haha... ->Just sign on the signature line. Karin Chang: Okie dokie... Karin Chang: ... Karin Chang: I... Where was I again? <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: Ah! No doctor!;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾) >> Karin Chang: I don't wanna medical check! Waive it! Thought: But her being here means she must have already passed the health screening. Thought: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Thought: The paperwork does say she needs a second health screening, though... Karin Chang: The old guy said I can waive the second check. Karin Chang: You can waive it, right?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why did they say you need a second health screening? There must be a reason? Karin Chang: That is...not important.;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Karin Chang: Why do you even care? It's my privacy! ->But I believe you do need a second screening. Karin Chang: Who? Me? No!;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> Thought: She's panicking. What's she trying to hide? Karin Chang: I'm all clean now...;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐很冷) >> Thought: ... Thought: Retching, shivering, babbling... Thought: Symptoms of Nanphetamin withdrawal. She's a dopehead... Karin Chang: Hurry the heck up! I've got, like, places to be! Thought: She's desperate for a quick fix. Thought: Edith said flop contribution and drug abuse together could leave people disabled or dead.;//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Karin Chang: Waive the med check, pleeeeease?;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐很冷返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure. Let's waive it. Karin Chang: Great. Karin Chang: I'm signing, then. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wait. Are you sure? Karin Chang: Sure of what? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Flop contribution might leave you permanently disabled. ->A second health screening is for your best interest. Karin Chang: ... Karin Chang: None of your business. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I will not waive your second health screening. <<#GoTo(@張可霖蛤為什麼啊啊)>> ->Your life, your call. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: ...;<< Play (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_開啟) >>;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐簽名) >>;<< PlayUntil (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_點擊) >> Karin Chang: Here, signed.;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐簽名返回) >> Karin Chang: I'm going. Ciao. <>;<<#End>> ->You have substance abuse problem. Karin Chang: ...!? Karin Chang: So what? I can sell brain juice! Karin Chang: Nobody said dopeheads can't do it! ->I will not waive it. <<@張可霖蛤為什麼啊啊>> Karin Chang: Huh? Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because I can tell you're on drugs. Karin Chang: I-I'm not! ->I just won't. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: You have any idea who my dad is? Karin Chang: City rep! He'll kick your ass if you keep saying no! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What am I? Born yesterday? A city rep's daughter, selling brain juice? Karin Chang: !! Karin Chang: He doesn't give me money. What can I do? ->I don't care who your dad is. No means no. Karin Chang: You can't—! <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: I need money! Now! Thought: Need money for dope.;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐低頭) >> Thought: I can't sign her on. She's a ticking bomb. Thought: But again, failing to get her signature means a ton of trouble for me... //前面有跟劉漢銘講兩個以上的不利細則 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold > 1)>> Thought: Especially when I just got the company into a bad deal... <<#EndIf>> Karin Chang: OK! Do your med check then!;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Karin Chang: Whatever they find out, they can't stop me! Karin Chang: I just didn't want to leave a record... Karin Chang: Why bother? Mom and dad don't care, anyway. Thought: She's agitated. Karin Chang: I'm signing here. We all done?;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾) >> Thought: She's an adult, capable of making her own decisions... Thought: Let her have what she wants. I have a job to grab... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->OK. Please sign. <<#GoTo(@對張可霖說可以簽啊，讓她反問不阻止我了喔？)>> ->No. I won't let you kill yourself. <<@對張可霖說不行簽>> Karin Chang: The fuck do you care, huh? Karin Chang: My parents don't care. Who are you to give lectures, huh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Go home, or see a doctor. Karin Chang: You go see a doctor. See a shrink! Weirdo! Thought: Enough is enough... Thought: Like she said, I'm not her parents... Karin Chang: You done playing the saint yet? <<#GoTo(@對張可霖說好啊，那你簽吧。)>> ->I'm responsible if anything happens to you. Thought: Wait what?? Thought: I'm responsible for myself and those I care, nothing more. Karin Chang: Responsible my ass! Thought: I'm not responsible for this dopehead. No way... <<@對張可霖說好啊，那你簽吧。>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->OK. Go on. Sign it. <<@對張可霖說可以簽啊，讓她反問不阻止我了喔？>> Karin Chang: ... Karin Chang: You're not trying to stop me anymore?;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Didn't you specifically ask for this? Karin Chang: I, um... Thought: Is she...crying? Karin Chang: Right! I asked for this!;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾) >> Karin Chang: My signature! Take it! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wait. Karin Chang: What now? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Signing the contract on a whim means you're essentially a child. Karin Chang: Yeah! Right! I'm a damn kid! So what? <<#Simple(6)>> ->In that case, you should not sign a document of legal force and effect. Karin Chang: ... Karin Chang: Whatever! Have it your way!;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Karin Chang: I'm out of here! Karin Chang: Goodbye. <>;<<#End>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: Here, signed... Karin Chang: ... Karin Chang: Goodbye. <>;<<#End>> ->I try to talk you out of it, because I care about you, for you. Karin Chang: ... <<@因為我不想跨你傷害你自己啦>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->The last thing I want to see is you hurting yourself. Karin Chang: ...;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾哭泣) >> Karin Chang: What should I do? Karin Chang: How can I make them care!? Thought: I've heard the same question from Fran, but... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Honestly, I have no idea. ->Do whatever you must, but not this. Karin Chang: They don't care about me anyway. Karin Chang: What should I...;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾哭泣抬頭) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You should stop caring about whether they care. Karin Chang: If mom and dad don't care about me... Karin Chang: Who will? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Someone down the road, maybe not there right now. Live on. Find out. ->The only person you should care about is yourself. <<#GoTo(@張可霖霖縮抱歉，給你添麻煩了。)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->You must stop hurting yourself. <<@張可霖霖縮抱歉，給你添麻煩了。>> Karin Chang: ... Karin Chang: I know.;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾哭泣抬頭返回) >> Karin Chang: Sorry for bringing this on you. Karin Chang: ... Karin Chang: I, um... Karin Chang: I won't sign this contract... <<#Simple(6)>> ->You did the right thing. Karin Chang: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: Since I'm not signing, am I free to leave now? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. Take good care of yourself. ->Yes. Go home. <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: ...;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾哭泣返回) >> Karin Chang: Goodbye. <>;<<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: Damn! Whatever! Have it your way!;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Karin Chang: I'm out of here! Karin Chang: Goodbye. <>;<<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Go on. Sign it. Karin Chang: OK. Have it your way.;<< Play (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_開啟) >>;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐簽名) >>;<< PlayUntil (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_點擊) >> <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: Here. Done.;<< Play (張可霖, MBU_張可霖_簽約側坐簽名返回) >> Karin Chang: Goodbye. <>;<<#End>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Karin Chang: ...Why? Why do you have to say no? Thought: She's backing down, a little... <<#GoTo(@因為我不想跨你傷害你自己啦)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Are you aware of the consequences of this signature? Karin Chang: I become a vegetable. Big deal. Karin Chang: I did my research. The chance is low. Karin Chang: Even if I croak, as if anyone cares... Thought: Obviously she didn't think things through. Thought: Still, it's none of my business... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->OK. Please sign. <<#GoTo(@對張可霖說可以簽啊，讓她反問不阻止我了喔？)>> ->No. I won't let you. <<#GoTo(@對張可霖說不行簽)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>>

body:
Karin Chang: ...;//張可霖停住轉頭
Karin Chang:Thank you.
<<#End>>

body:

<<#Simple(6)>>

<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 鄭緯開始檢討跟張可霖的簽約過程
body: Thought: What's with that awkward face?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Man, I hate moments like this...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: First of all, I promise... Wayne Zheng: ...that what you just saw is the last of Ms. Yeh's tests. No more.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Thought: WHAT!? Thought: It was yet another test? Wayne Zheng: She assigned you Karin Chang's case to find out how you make moral decisions when there are explicit orders from above. Wayne Zheng: This line of work deals with life and death scenarios. Everyone on the job must be well qualified and prepared. Wayne Zheng: We knew Ms. Chang was not fit for contribution, and the plan was to reject her during signing. //如果最後有讓張可霖簽約。 <<#If($EndingChangCoLin = 1)>> <<#GoTo(@但是我剛剛已經讓張可霖簽約啦)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#If($EndingChangCoLin = 3)>> <<@但是我剛剛已經讓張可霖簽約啦>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->But I already signed her on. Wayne Zheng: Don't worry. Someone will let her know that she's disqualified. Wayne Zheng: Under no circumstances should we let a drug abuser in.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Her spot is reserved, until she passes a second health screening. Wayne Zheng: If she manages to do that, though, I suppose she wouldn't need to come back here anymore. Thought: This whole thing is staged from end to end, then.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: I was watching the entire process through the surveillance camera. Wayne Zheng: Like what Ms. Yeh did when you were in consultation sessions. <<#Simple(6)>> ->She is really going out of her way to test people, no? Wayne Zheng: I totally agree with you. For recruitment, she's going too far.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐點頭) >> Wayne Zheng: You have every reason to feel offended. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Anyone would have felt the same. Wayne Zheng: You're right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I apologize.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: But Ms. Yeh... Wayne Zheng: I guess you have a fairly good idea about her personality. Wayne Zheng: She's determined, thorough, never thinking twice about doing the necessary evil. Wayne Zheng: Don't expect her to apologize like I just did. <<#Simple(6)>> ->What are you trying to say? Wayne Zheng: All I wanted to say was... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: This is how she does things. If you're hired, prepare to see more of it.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: If it's really not up to your taste, consider giving up on this job. You can't change her. Wayne Zheng: Think about it after your field practice. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: OK, back to Karin Chang's case. Wayne Zheng: Like I said, I was there watching the entire process. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Hold on. Ms. Yeh told you to leave me on my own? Wayne Zheng: No. That was my idea.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: I could have sat next to you to chaperone the whole thing. Wayne Zheng: Then I thought, you did what you did, probably to impress me. Wayne Zheng: The point of this test is to find out how you make decisions on your own. Maybe I'd better make myself scarce...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->You're enjoying Ms. Yeh's little game, too? Wayne Zheng: Don't take me wrong. I don't enjoy it. Wayne Zheng: I do agree it's a legitimate method, though. Or else I wouldn't participate. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I must say that... //1一開始就立刻幫她取消健康檢查並讓她簽約 <<#If($EndingChangCoLin = 1)>> Wayne Zheng: You didn't care about the case enough.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> Wayne Zheng: Didn't ask why she wanted to waive the screening. Green light on the spot. Wayne Zheng: Why's that? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She's responsible for her own interests. ->I didn't see a reason to say no. Wayne Zheng: Technically. But couldn't you tell she's unwell? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Unwell, yes, but not my problem. Wayne Zheng: ... Thought: He doesn't like my response... Wayne Zheng: Okay. You have a point. Wayne Zheng: Not your problem, indeed. <<@只是我們對於你對張可霖的做法有超出責任的期待>> Wayne Zheng: The thing is, we expected more—accountability beyond assigned responsibilities. <<#Simple(6)>> ->But I failed to get her signature, I'll be toast. Wayne Zheng: You are right. I don't blame you for it. Wayne Zheng: It's a reasonable judgment. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Anyway, I'll report to Ms. Yeh about the process.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> <>;<<#GoTo(@評價完張可霖簽約過程)>> ->Unwell? How? Wayne Zheng: ... Thought: I can tell he doesn't believe me... Wayne Zheng: OK, maybe you failed to notice, alright. Wayne Zheng: But you shouldn't let her pass just like that. Wayne Zheng: I will report this detail to Ms. Yeh, too.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> <>;<<#GoTo(@評價完張可霖簽約過程)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //2拒簽張可霖，但沒有溫情對話 <<#If($EndingChangCoLin = 2)>> Wayne Zheng: You made a right, and brave, decision.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> Wayne Zheng: More importantly, it was not to impress me. Wayne Zheng: You knew perfectly well that rejecting her could cost you this job... Wayne Zheng: Still, you did what you had to. ////有選兩個以上的不利細則 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold > 1)>> Wayne Zheng: That, plus your performance in Hank Liu's case, says a lot about your character.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: Now I believe you are the right breed of people for this job. Wayne Zheng: No guarantee you can handle the stress, though, haha.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾抬手返回) >> <<#GoTo(@拒簽張可霖又給劉漢銘很多好處路線)>> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: I'll make sure Ms. Yeh hears about it. Wayne Zheng: Well done, Jason.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> <>;<<#GoTo(@評價完張可霖簽約過程)>> <<#EndIf>> //3試圖勸她，但她還是簽了。主角也沒拒絕她。 <<#If($EndingChangCoLin = 3)>> Wayne Zheng: I don't understand why you had her sign the contract in the end.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I didn't "have" her sign the contract. She did it of her own accord. Wayne Zheng: You knew her mental state was far from stable. Wayne Zheng: Someone should have talked her out of it, don't you think? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She is not my responsibility. Wayne Zheng: Right. She is not. <<#GoTo(@只是我們對於你對張可霖的做法有超出責任的期待)>> ->Are you blaming me for not stepping in? Wayne Zheng: I don't mean that. Wayne Zheng: And I know if you did change her mind, it could cost you this job... <<#Simple(10)>> ->Glad we have this mutual understanding. Wayne Zheng: It's the least I could do. ->The job was not my concern. I only wanted her to make her own life decisions. Wayne Zheng: But she was not in the right mind. Wayne Zheng: Wait. We're going around in circles. Wayne Zheng: You're saying she should be responsible for herself. I'm saying she's not capable of it. Wayne Zheng: A difference of opinions, and I'd hate myself if you're forced to accept mine. Wayne Zheng: I respect your decision. Let's leave it like that.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Thank you for the respect. Wayne Zheng: It's the least I could do. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <>;<<#GoTo(@評價完張可霖簽約過程)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: You were under no obligation to do so, especially when your own interest was at stake. Wayne Zheng: I'm pursuing this conversation only to avoid forming premature opinions. I need to know what you think.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> <>;<<#GoTo(@評價完張可霖簽約過程)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I'll lose this job if she didn't sign. Wayne Zheng: A legitimate concern... Thought: Although he doesn't sound very happy about this "legitimate concern". <<#Simple(6)>> ->What's your comment? Wayne Zheng: I have no comment. Wayne Zheng: You were under no obligation to do so, especially when your own interest was at stake.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Wayne Zheng: I'm pursuing this conversation only to avoid forming premature opinions. I need to know what you think. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <>;<<#GoTo(@評價完張可霖簽約過程)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //4深度對談，勸她不要簽，她也決定不簽了。(好結局) <<#If($EndingChangCoLin = 4)>> Wayne Zheng: What you did was outstanding!;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> Wayne Zheng: I shed a few tears on the other side of the camera. Thought: What exactly did I do right...? Wayne Zheng: You made her give up, of her own accord!;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: This is a very tricky case. Unreasonable candidate, not to mention your job at stake. Wayne Zheng: However, you managed to talk her out of it, even gave her a light of hope. Wayne Zheng: That conversation will have far-reaching effects on her life, I believe.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I just gave her a few timely pushes. Wayne Zheng: You have a talent for this, Jason. ->Hopefully it helps. Wayne Zheng: It does! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: She is a poor child craving for attention.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Her family certainly isn't helping. Wayne Zheng: Having you to feel for her, care about her, might have changed her life in a subtle way. <<#Simple(6)>> ->That would be great. Wayne Zheng: Yes, indeed. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ////有選兩個以上的不利細則 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold > 1)>> <> Wayne Zheng: You gave Hank Liu the help he needed. Wayne Zheng: Then you did the same to Karin Chang. Wayne Zheng: I will make sure they assign you to Screening. You will truly shine.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> <<@拒簽張可霖又給劉漢銘很多好處路線>> Thought: I got the company a bad deal in one case, no deal in the other. Thought: Surely the AI algorithm wouldn't be too happy about it... <<#Simple(8)>> ->If the AI doesn't disqualify me. Wayne Zheng: Yeah. Based on what we have here, it's a real concern. Wayne Zheng: On the other hand, Ms. Yeh won't allow an AI to override her decisions. Thought: Eh? He's contradicting himself... <<#Simple(8)>> ->But you told me even managers can't go against the AI. Wayne Zheng: I said managers can't. Wayne Zheng: Eva Yeh isn't your average manager. Wayne Zheng: If she believes you're worthy, she will find a way. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I will report to her everything you did. She'll be more than happy to help you out. Wayne Zheng: Anyway, unfavorable terms are better than no contract at all. That would be catastrophic. //如果前面阿姨把主角轟出去 <<#If($InterviewHandleBadCount>1)>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Doubt so. She practically kicked me out of the office. Wayne Zheng: Huh? For what? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->For screwing up consultation in an epic way. Wayne Zheng: What did you do? Got into a fight?;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Thought: That I did...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: That is not good. Consultation is a critical part of this job, after all. Wayne Zheng: Contract negotiation means little if you're not fit for consultation. Wayne Zheng: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Nonetheless, I'll talk to her. Don't set your expectations too high, though.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> ->I don't know. Wayne Zheng: She's not exactly a kind lady... Wayne Zheng: But there must be a legit reason for her to show the mean side. Wayne Zheng: Maybe you did something wrong...? Wayne Zheng: Or maybe it's just some misunderstanding. Wayne Zheng: One way or another, I will have a talk with her. <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Empathy is the quality we always look for. Wayne Zheng: Flop farming is one ugly business... Wayne Zheng: We are essentially exploiting the poorest of the society for what little they are worth. Wayne Zheng: At the very least, we should treat them kindly, fairly. <<#Simple(6)>> ->How do you turn a profit, doing business like that? Wayne Zheng: Doing the right thing and the profitable thing, there's middle ground somewhere. Wayne Zheng: At the end of the day, though, we're a commercial operation, like you pointed out. Wayne Zheng: Let's just say we do our best where we can. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: All things considered, I will vouch for you in front of Ms. Yeh.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Wayne Zheng: If she gives the green light, you're all good. Silencio can't outweigh her. <>;<<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> <<#EndIf>> //如果劉漢銘簽約時沒有對他好 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold < 2)>> <> <<#GoTo(@評價完張可霖簽約過程)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> <<@評價完張可霖簽約過程>> Wayne Zheng: OK. So much for field practice today.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐點頭) >> Thought: Finally. Wayne Zheng: I will let you know when Ms. Yeh has a final verdict.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: Before that, spend some more time in the office. Wayne Zheng: Let's get going. Someone else is waiting in line for this room.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->May I know how am I doing so far? Wayne Zheng: By who's standard? Mine? Hers? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yours. <<@簽約完問阿緯對是杰的看法關於錄取機會>> //1怕丟工作沒有拒簽，處理上感覺跟這裡的做事方式不太合 <<#If($EndingChungWeiScoreCoLin=1)>> //沒有幫劉漢銘 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold<2)>> Wayne Zheng: Not bad. No worse than the average.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐思考) >> Wayne Zheng: But considering the competition, you must do better than average to stand out. Wayne Zheng: You are a practical guy, albeit not quite ready to stand up against authorities. Wayne Zheng: To most companies, you will make a great employee. Hardworking, easy to manage.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐思考返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->But? Wayne Zheng: But Silencio is not like most companies. A special line of work, for a special breed of people. ->Meaning my chances are good? Wayne Zheng: Sorry to disappoint. Exactly the opposite. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I think I told you that our job deals with life and death scenarios all the time. Wayne Zheng: We don't want employees to make inappropriate decisions under...influences. Wayne Zheng: I really hate to say this, but Jason, please be prepared that you may not get the job. Wayne Zheng: Hey, I'm not saying you won't.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: It's just that the Ms. Yeh I know wouldn't rate you too favorably, I think. Wayne Zheng: Don't feel low yet, man. You have another shot at Ops! Wayne Zheng: Maybe you're a perfect fit there!;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> Thought: ... <> <<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> <<#EndIf>> //幫助劉漢銘 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold>1)>> Wayne Zheng: Hmmm... Wayne Zheng: My personal opinion, based on Hank Liu's case, is that you are a good fit for Screening. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I guess Silencio will beg to differ. Wayne Zheng: Haha, yes! Wayne Zheng: Silencio doesn't matter if Ms. Yeh vouches for you. <<#Simple(8)>> ->That's not what you said before. Wayne Zheng: I did say managers normally can't overturn decisions made by the AI.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐點頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Eva Yeh isn't your average manager. Wayne Zheng: If she believes you're worthy, she will find a way. ->She will overturn Silencio's decision? Wayne Zheng: Ha! I see you know her pretty well already. <<#EndSimple>> ->Thank you. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: You are a good man, who's not afraid of doing the right thing.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> Wayne Zheng: When it comes to the occasion to stick it to the man, though, you tend to yield... Wayne Zheng: Hey, I'm not saying it's a bad thing. Following orders is the number one quality for a lot of jobs here at the farm. Wayne Zheng: If we all challenge the boss on everything, how do we do business? <<#Simple(8)>> ->So? Wayne Zheng: Hmmm... ->I think following orders is the fundamental. Wayne Zheng: Sure, for some positions. Wayne Zheng: Here at Screening, though, I don't think so. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: I don't know.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Hard to tell what your chances are. Maybe 50/50? <> <<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> //2張可霖的事件上觀察力很弱，如果不是若就是裝沒看到那更糟 <<#If($EndingChungWeiScoreCoLin = 2)>> Wayne Zheng: I don't know how your consultation sessions went. Wayne Zheng: Based on contract negotiation, I guess you're not very perceptive. Thought: He's referring to Karin Chang's case...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: You failed to notice something's wrong with her, or so you say.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬頭) >> Wayne Zheng: At Screening, you will be dealing with all sorts of people on a daily basis. Most of them have things to hide. Wayne Zheng: Noticing and finding out what's wrong is a critical skill. Thought: He thinks I'm not fit for the job.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Thought: I did notice she's weird, just didn't want to admit.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬頭返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wait, I did notice. You must have heard me wrong. Wayne Zheng: So, you were lying to me. <<#GoTo(@阿緯問主角是不是騙沒發現可霖吸毒啊)>> ->I did notice. Sorry I lied. Wayne Zheng: ... <<@阿緯問主角是不是騙沒發現可霖吸毒啊>> Wayne Zheng: You lied, after I told you what this test is for? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. I'm sorry. Wayne Zheng: Now you choose to tell me the truth, because the lie begins to turn sour, making you appear unperceptive? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. I'm truly sorry. Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Better late than never. Honesty is always good. ->Yes. I don't want you to get the wrong idea. Wayne Zheng: Ha. There wouldn't be any wrong idea if you didn't lie back then, wouldn't you say? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm not blaming you. Just speaking my mind out loud. Wayne Zheng: Acknowledged. Thought: At least he doesn't look mad... ->Yes, but you can't call me unperceptive.;<> Thought: What the hell am I talking about...? Wayne Zheng: Did you... Wayne Zheng: Okay, whatever you say.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: The fact is you noticed Karin Chang's drug abuse and lied about it. Wayne Zheng: You can't argue against that.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Nope. Just didn't want to tell you.;<> Wayne Zheng: Huh... Thought: He's not convinced. Wayne Zheng: Now you suddenly want to tell me, because otherwise it makes you look bad...? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't you believe? Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: No, not very much. ->Exactly. Wayne Zheng: Acknowledged. Thought: I think he's still not convinced... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: You know...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: The thing about lies is not the immediate consequence. Wayne Zheng: Once you're caught lying, people will have trouble believing in anything you say. Wayne Zheng: Fact is one thing, credibility is another. Thought: ...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Let's put that aside. Wayne Zheng: So much about Karin Chang's case... //有幫劉漢銘 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold>1)>> Wayne Zheng: At least you gave Hank Liu the help he needs. I approve, and I believe Ms. Yeh will, too.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: I will report to her what I saw. The rest is up to her. Wayne Zheng: Now, back to your question.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Personally, I don't think your chance at Screening is very good. Wayne Zheng: Close to 50%, but not quite there. Thought: That sounds bad... <> <<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> <<#EndIf>> //給劉漢銘一個細則 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold=1)>> Wayne Zheng: You navigated the negotiation with Hank Liu in a practical way. Wayne Zheng: You decided to give him some bonus, instead of staying mum about it.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Maybe Ms. Yeh will approve? Wayne Zheng: Personally, though, I'd like to see you extend the help a bit further.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: I know personal opinions shouldn't count. But hey, we are talking about my office, my crew. Of course I prefer like-minded people. Thought: Doing business like that, how does he make profit...?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: That's about it.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> Wayne Zheng: I wouldn't say you have no chance, but it's very slim. Wayne Zheng: Sorry. <> <<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> <<#EndIf>> //完全沒給劉漢銘細則 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold<1)>> Wayne Zheng: You didn't tell Hank Liu about any bonus that he's eligible for. Wayne Zheng: From a commercial perspective, it's a good thing. Silencio will give you extra points for it, no doubt... <<#Simple(8)>> ->But morally it's bad? ->But you want to hire some living saint, which I'm not. Wayne Zheng: ... Thought: I went too far...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: I thought I was expressing myself in a neutral way. Wayne Zheng: If you take it as a jab at your moral standards, sorry, I really didn't mean it. Wayne Zheng: Of course, you have your freedom of speech and opinions.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: But your personality does not align well with the values we believe in at Screening. Wayne Zheng: As I said before, this job has life-changing consequences. We prefer someone with empathy.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: I'm not saying you're bad. It's just that what you provide is not exactly what we need. Wayne Zheng: Back to your question.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> Wayne Zheng: I don't think you have a chance here. Sorry. Thought: ... <> <> <<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> //3幫張可琳了，但是沒幫劉漢銘(不管事完美路線還是普通正確路線，只要沒幫劉漢銘都直接接過來) <<#If($EndingChungWeiScoreCoLin = 3)>> Wayne Zheng: I think your chances are fairly good. What you did with Karin Chang was exceptional. Wayne Zheng: Personally, I'd totally vouch for you. Wayne Zheng: But at the end of the day it's all up to Ms. Yeh, especially the part involving Hank Liu.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: This line of work is all about being diplomatic. I can't make you big promises. Wayne Zheng: But I believe in you, man!;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> Thought: Great... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Thank you. Wayne Zheng: Don't thank me. You earned it yourself! ->I see your point. Wayne Zheng: Have some confidence. Don't read too much into it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> <<#EndIf>> //4覺得張可霖要自己負責 <<#If($EndingChungWeiScoreCoLin = 4)>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: This is complicated. First, let's find out what you think.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: I see that everyone should be ultimately responsible for his or her own decisions.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: You wouldn't like to affect their opinions, which could be a violation of their rights. Do you agree?;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Thought: Yes. Thought: If we take care of ourselves, the world would be a perfect place.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't mind intervening, not until they resist. Wayne Zheng: I see your point. <<@戴士傑超在意別人的自由不亂給意見>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->But you're looking for someone who'd actively intervene? Wayne Zheng: Not quite. Wayne Zheng: We want someone who knows how to care for people. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: The way you see things, I believe you do care about people. Wayne Zheng: This is generally in line with our values.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手) >> Wayne Zheng: It's just that you care about their rights more than their wellbeing. Wayne Zheng: Not wanting to manipulate their life is a good point. I agree with you. Wayne Zheng: I will talk to Ms. Yeh about it.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐抬手返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Back to your question. Wayne Zheng: Honestly, I can't say. Hard to tell what Ms. Yeh thinks about you. //幫劉漢銘很多 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold>1)>> Wayne Zheng: You gave Hank Liu a lot of help, even knowing it's against your own interest... Wayne Zheng: I think you truly care about the candidates, yet you don't want to manipulate their lives. Wayne Zheng: I will make sure Ms. Yeh is aware of it. Promise. <<#EndIf>> <<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> ->Right. I do what I can, within my responsibilities. Wayne Zheng: So. I see. <<#Simple(8)>> ->But you're looking for someone who'd actively intervene? Wayne Zheng: Not quite. Wayne Zheng: We want someone who knows how to care for people. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Based on your performance, and what you told me... //幫劉漢銘不夠多 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold<2)>> Wayne Zheng: I can't tell if you care about others, not yet.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: I believe you must have figured out that we value this quality, the ability to care. Thought: Sounds like I don't have much of a chance... Wayne Zheng: I will tell Ms. Yeh about what you did and what you think. Promise.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: As to the verdict, it's all up to her. <> <<#EndIf>> //幫劉漢銘很多 <<#If($WhatBenefitTold>1)>> Wayne Zheng: I believe you truly care about people.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾) >> Wayne Zheng: You gave Hank Liu a lot of help, even knowing it's against your own interest... Wayne Zheng: That is enough to convince me, and I believe Ms. Yeh will feel the same. Thought: So far so good. Wayne Zheng: I will tell Ms. Yeh about what you did and what you think. Promise.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐前傾返回) >> Wayne Zheng: As to the verdict, it's all up to her. <> <<#EndIf>> <<#GoTo(@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束)>> ->I will intervene, unless there is too much at risk. Wayne Zheng: Give advice on relatively unimportant matters, but leave them to make their own big decisions. Wayne Zheng: Understood.;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐點頭) >> <<#GoTo(@戴士傑超在意別人的自由不亂給意見)>> ->I intervene only when there is too much at stake. Wayne Zheng: In the case of Karin Chang, the stake is not high enough? Wayne Zheng: We are talking about the risk of permanent disability or death. Thought: ... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Okay, it's high enough. Wayne Zheng: In other words, you misjudged the situation, but not on purpose. Wayne Zheng: I see... <<#GoTo(@戴士傑超在意別人的自由不亂給意見)>> ->By my standard, only immediate danger qualifies for "too much at stake". Haha... <<#Simple(8)>> ->What about yours? <<#GoTo(@簽約完問阿緯對是杰的看法關於錄取機會)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<@玩家主動問阿緯評價結束>> Wayne Zheng: That was it. Wayne Zheng: Let's get going. We only booked this room for so long. //啊緯先站起走向大門，緊跟著主角站起，這時主角只能走路不能跑步，等啊緯接近門口時突然一陣急促的敲門聲。 //啊緯停住 Wayne Zheng: ... //啊緯走道門口，門突然打開 <<#End>>

title: 工作人員逃難進簽約室
簽約走廊對峙
body:
//曾樹成拿著刀子抵著一個奄奄一息的人的脖子
//其中一間簽約室的門室半開的，裡面有死人
Sheldon Tseng: Get your boss here, motherfuckers!
Sheldon Tseng: I'm gonna kill him for what he did!
Wayne Zheng: What's happening?
Jeff Wu: No idea!
Jeff Wu: This psycho busted out of a contract room and started to stab people!
Jeff Wu: Keeps asking for the boss. I, I—
Wayne Zheng: Calm down. Silencio should have already sounded the alarm.
Wayne Zheng: Security officers must be on their way. We just need to buy some more time.
Jeff Wu: B-but Lawrence! He took a stab for me and is bleeding out!
Jeff Wu: I don't know—
Wayne Zheng: Jeff, calm down.
Wayne Zheng: I'll try to keep him occupied.
Sheldon Tseng: The fuck are you whispering about?!
Sheldon Tseng: You deaf or what?
Sheldon Tseng: I said I'll keep killing you fuckers until your motherfucking boss shows himself!
Wayne Zheng: The boss will be here soon. Very soon.
<<#End>>
 
//曾樹成把手上那個人甩開，朝人群衝過來，除了主角以外的人都嚇到往後撤進戰鬥

title: 跟瘋子戰鬥完
body: //吳晉峰衝去照顧隆生，鄭緯靠近主角，躲在簽約室的人也照顧其他傷患 Wayne Zheng: Jason? Are you OK? Wayne Zheng: You, what, knocked him out?;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站微慌) >> Thought: He'll stay down for a while. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He can't do any more harm, for now. Wayne Zheng: Did you... Thought: He looks shocked.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站微慌返回) >> ->Someone has to step up, eh? Wayne Zheng: Sorry... Wayne Zheng: I was caught unprepared. I thought—;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站微慌返回) >> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Th-thank you for stopping him. Thought: He looks shocked. <<#EndSimple>> <> Jeff Wu: Wayne! Lawrence, he—!;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >> Lawrence Chang: I'm OK. Flesh wound... Jeff Wu: Hey, stay still! Wayne Zheng: Don't move him, Jeff. Paramedics and security officers will be here soon. Wayne Zheng: I need to inform Ms. Yeh. This mess must be taken care of asap. Wayne Zheng: Sorry, Jason. Your review may have to wait.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >> Wayne Zheng: We will let you know tomorrow. OK? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Don't worry about me. You do what you do. Wayne Zheng: OK.;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_側站點頭) >> ->Where are you going now? Wayne Zheng: Contact the police. Find out who the heck he is. Wayne Zheng: More importantly, make sure everyone is safe. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Do me a favor, will you? Go to the office, tell Edith to suspend all contract signing for the day. Wayne Zheng: Could you do that? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站點頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Great. ->What exactly shall I tell her? Wayne Zheng: Put all contracts to be signed on hold. Say I told you to pass the message. Wayne Zheng: She will know. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: That's it, for now. Wayne Zheng: You were like an action hero back there, man. Lawrence Chang: Seriously... Lawrence Chang: Kickass! Jeff Wu: Calm down! You're bleeding out! Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: I'll be on my way, then. //鄭緯離開 <> Jeff Wu: Why is Wayne so surprised? You were in the army before, ain't you, Jason?; Jeff Wu: Super commando, no shit. <<#Simple(6)>> ->It's nothing, really. Jeff Wu: Dude, you had his ass handed to him before we knew it! Jeff Wu: That was like, awesome! ->How did you know I served in the army? Jeff Wu: Come on, this is Vision! What do we not know? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jeff Wu: OK, don't let me keep you. Go inform Edith. Jeff Wu: Don't worry about us. Help will be here soon.; <<#End>> //離開簽約走廊以後幾台無人機跟幾名警衛會趕過來，包括蕭永明才趕到現場。他們會把簽約走廊封起來 //玩家回頭救護發現被封起來了，蕭勇明負責守門。

title: 程芳打電話過來
body:
Thought: Done. So much work for today.
Thought: Time to see Fran.
Frances Cheng(c): Hey J! You're all done with work?
Thought: Shall I tell Fran about that encounter in the corridor?
Thought: I don't want to have her worried, though...
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah, off work now.
    Frances Cheng(c): Yay! Perfect timing!
    Frances Cheng(c): I'm granting you elevator access right now.
    Frances Cheng(c): See you in the lobby on F1.
    Frances Cheng(c): No hurry. Take care of unfinished work if you have to.
    Frances Cheng(c): Come find me when you're ready.
    Frances Cheng(c): Then we go to the roof for the view, and go home together!
    Frances Cheng(c): See you!
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->See you.
    ->Love you.
        Frances Cheng(c): Hee hee. Love you, too!
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#End>>
->Hey, Fran, there's something you might want to know.;<<Set($TellFangAboutTheAttack,true)>>
    Frances Cheng(c): Huh? What is it?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Someone infiltrated the farm earlier today, and stabbed multiple people.
    ->Someone almost stabbed me a while ago.
        Frances Cheng(c): WHAT!?
        Frances Cheng(c): What did you say!?
        Frances Cheng(c): Hold on. Lemme check...
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        <<#GoTo(@程芳跑去查清楚關於攻擊事件的情況)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>


<<@程芳跑去查清楚關於攻擊事件的情況>>
Thought: Check...?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭)>>
Thought: Check what?
Thought: I wonder how much she could find out...
Thought: ...And how she'd react.


Frances Cheng(c): Jason! Are you hurt!?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭返回)>>
Thought: That was...quick!?
Thought: Looks like she knows everything now...
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Not a scratch.
->Relax. I'm fine.
    //
->How much did you find out?
    Frances Cheng(c): Don't try to change the subject! Answer my question!
    Frances Cheng(c): Are you hurt?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Not a scratch.
    ->Relax. I'm fine.
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): Really? Don't try to lie to me!
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Really. I'm totally fine.
    Frances Cheng(c): Phew...
->Well, no loose or missing parts last time I checked.
    Frances Cheng(c): Jason Dai! I'm serious!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): I was worried sick!
Frances Cheng(c): Why did you fight that psycho!?
<<#Simple(6)>>
->You knew about that?
->How did you find out?
    Frances Cheng(c): I know everything, okay!?
    Frances Cheng(c): Silencio informed all L2 executives. Now the police is involved.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): For a second I thought you were...
Thought: She's on the verge of tears...
Frances Cheng(c): Please, don't do that again.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Someone had to stop him.
    Frances Cheng(c): It doesn't have to be you!;//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    Thought: ...
->Okay. I won't do it again. Promise.
    Frances Cheng(c): ...
    Frances Cheng(c): When you make a promise, you keep it.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): ...
Frances Cheng(c): Sorry, J...
Frances Cheng(c): I shouldn't blame you, after everything that happened...
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Don't worry, Fran. I'm OK.
    Frances Cheng(c): ...
    Frances Cheng(c): Yeah.
    Frances Cheng(c): I'm so glad that you're OK!
->I don't mind.
    Frances Cheng(c): Thanks...
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): After everything that happened, I guess you're done for the day.
Frances Cheng(c): Here, you have elevator access now. Let's meet in the F1 lobby.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭)>>
Frances Cheng(c): Oh, and no hurry if you have more work to do.
Frances Cheng(c): I'm not going anywhere. I'll wait for you in the lobby.
Frances Cheng(c): ...
Frances Cheng(c): That's it. See you there.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Love you.
    Frances Cheng(c): ...
    Frances Cheng(c): Love you, too.
->See you.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
 
<<#End>>

title: 大廳和程芳說話
body:
//分成知道事件，和不知道事件。
 
 
 
//芳站起來走到主角旁邊
//不知道事件
<<#If($TellFangAboutTheAttack = false)>>
    Frances Cheng: Hmm?
    <<#Wait(2)>>
    Frances Cheng: JASON DAI!?
    Frances Cheng: Why didn't you tell me!?;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰)>>
    Thought: Don't tell me she found out what happened already...?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I really didn't want to have you worried.
        Frances Cheng: Now that I've found out, I'm twice as worried!
        Frances Cheng: Please, don't do that again!
    ->I thought it's probably better to tell you in person.
        Frances Cheng: No! If anything like this ever happens again, I want to know right away!
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Frances Cheng: Do you know how I felt, hearing about you from others?
    Frances Cheng: I'd go downstairs to check on you, if it weren't for Mr. Yan...;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰倒播)>>
    Thought: She's trembling...
    Frances Cheng: ...
    Frances Cheng: Are you really, really alright? I was worried sick.;<<PlayUntil(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_側站捧臉)>>
    Thought: ...
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->You worry about me, like, that much?
        Frances Cheng: That much, and more!!
        Frances Cheng: My heart froze when I heard about it.
    ->I'm perfectly OK, Fran.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Frances Cheng: Hmph. I can tell. That no-big-deal attitude.
    Thought: I love it when she smiles.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_側站捧臉返回)>>
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->By the way, who was that guy?
        Frances Cheng: That guy? Oh, he's the CEO of Vision Computation.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭)>>
        Thought: So, he's the boss of all flop farms under Vision.
        Frances Cheng: I should have told you about him, no? He's been nice to me.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭返回)>>
        Frances Cheng: It was he who approved my petition to transfer. No questions asked.
        Frances Cheng: More importantly, he's a good man, not morally bankrupt like other senior executives.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Frances Cheng: OK, now. Let's go!
    Frances Cheng: Elevator ride all the way up!
    <<#End>>
<<#EndIf>>


//我覺得這裡程芳擔心主角的時候可以捧他的臉！

<<#Wait(2)>>

Thought: ...
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->You worry about me, like, that much?
    Frances Cheng: That much, and more!!
    Frances Cheng: My heart froze when I heard about it.
->I'm perfectly OK, Fran.
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Hmph. I see you're OK now. That no-big-deal attitude.
Thought: I love it when she smiles.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_側站捧臉返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->By the way, who was that guy?
    Frances Cheng: That guy? Oh, he's the CEO of Vision Computation.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_白袍_側站轉頭)>>
