Jeff Wu: Jason took him down before I knew what was happening. Tyler Cao: Was anyone else hurt?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外) >>;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回) >> Jeff Wu: ...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭返回) >> Jeff Wu: I heard something from a medic... Jeff Wu: Said a consultant died. From another unit. Don't know his name... Jeff Wu: Killed on the spot, in room A3. The room is sealed off by the police.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭) >> Tyler Cao: ...;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外低頭) >> Cathy Hsieh: ... Quentin Qiu: ...;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回) >> Jeff Wu: Looks like the psycho went bonkers mid-session and stabbed him.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好低頭) >>;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭返回) >> Jeff Wu: Guy didn't even have time to call for help...;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外低頭返回) >> Jeff Wu: ... Quentin Qiu: I don't get it. Why is this happening?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐前傾) >>;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內) >> Quentin Qiu: The point is, how did he manage to bring a knife into the farm?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外轉頭) >> Quentin Qiu: The facility is specially designed with security in mind, to keep us safe. Quentin Qiu: We all know how unsafe it is outside. The insulation zone around the farm is created for exactly that. Quentin Qiu: Every single living thing waddling into this farm is scanned from head to toe. Quentin Qiu: If a knife can slip through, what if next time they sneak in a gun, huh?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐前傾返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Not too hard to get a gun in the Shithole, you know. Quentin Qiu: What are those surveillance cameras for, huh? Logistics and me spent so much time servicing them. Quentin Qiu: And what's Silencio for? Shouldn't it guard all contract rooms?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺) >> Quentin Qiu: Let an outsider in, just like that, huh? Quentin Qiu: The fuck...!? Cathy Hsieh: Could be a software glitch. Quentin Qiu: Huh?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後) >> Quentin Qiu: In a Vision farm? Maker of the world's cutting-edge AI? Quentin Qiu: Our state-of-the-art system has a stupid glitch? Cathy Hsieh: ...Exactly.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好低頭返回) >> Cathy Hsieh: Actually, software glitches have been reported in all sorts of places across the farm.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好左看) >> Cathy Hsieh: A security loophole is not unlikely. Thought: I'm one living example. Silencio showed me into the manager's office, more than once... <<#Simple(6)>> ->It let me into Ms. Yeh's office without her permission. Quentin Qiu: ...What? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Quentin Qiu: Wait. Quentin Qiu: If you knew about glitches, why didn't you, or anyone else, fix them? Cathy Hsieh: I would if I could. We ran a thorough diagnosis and realized there's a deeper cause. Quentin Qiu: Deeper cause? Cathy Hsieh: ... Thought: Cathy looks hesitant... Cathy Hsieh: Ops will handle it. Quentin Qiu: Damn, Ops again.;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Every single time! Quentin Qiu: If this farm blows up, it's because they screwed up! Cathy Hsieh: ... Quentin Qiu: Do they hate their job that much?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回) >> Quentin Qiu: This is so fucking stupid... Tyler Cao: Calm down, Quentin.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看轉左) >>;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內返回) >> Tyler Cao: Wayne will hold them liable if it's their fault. Tyler Cao: All we can do is wait. Quentin Qiu: ...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內) >> Quentin Qiu: I know.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看轉右) >> Quentin Qiu: But Jason and Lawrence deserve better. Quentin Qiu: They've only been here for days, and look what's already happened?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Shit happens. Quentin Qiu: Admire your attitude, Jayster. Tyler Cao: Plus, the way you dealt with that guy... Tyler Cao: You're seriously as cool as a cucumber. ->This farm seems to have its problems. Quentin Qiu: You could say the entire flop farming industry has its problems. Jeff Wu: I'd say the flop farming industry is the problem... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jeff Wu: Oh, you guys are not going home? After everything that happened?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Wayno said halt everything related to signing, which I'm not part of, so...;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外轉頭返回) >>;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好左看返回) >> <> George Liao: Jeff! Jeff Wu: Ah, it's Mr. Liao.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看外) >> Thought: George looks very...concerned? George Liao: Are you alright?;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側站微慌) >> George Liao: I heard about someone stabbing people around where you were, and—;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看外轉身) >> Jeff Wu: Slow down. Chill. I'm OK. Jeff Wu: Watch your blood pressure. George Liao: I'm not joking. Are you sure you're OK? Jeff Wu: Totally.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_轉身嘆氣) >> George Liao: Good. Good. As long as you're OK...;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側站微慌返回) >> George Liao: Otherwise I can't face your mom when I die. Jeff Wu: Certainly not that bad.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_轉身嘆氣抬手) >> George Liao: ... George Liao: Are you mentally OK? Tell me if you need a therapist. Jeff Wu: My boyfriend will take care of that. You just go home and rest, yeah?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_轉身嘆氣抬手返回) >> George Liao: You mean your friend.;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側站抬頭) >> George Liao: I'll go home when I want to. Don't come home too late. You hear me? Jeff Wu: Yeah. Chill.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_轉身嘆氣返回) >> George Liao: Hey, are you really, really, OK?;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側站抬頭返回) >> Jeff Wu: I said I'm OK! George Liao: Great. George Liao: I'll go help Wayne out. You feel anything wrong, you call me. Jeff Wu: I'm all-right alright. George Liao: Call me. You hear me? Jeff Wu: Will do. <> //廖吉興走掉 Jeff Wu: Weirdo. Why is he so worried?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_看外轉身返回) >> Quentin Qiu: He's worried about you. <<#Simple(6)>> ->May I ask what's your relationship with Mr. Liao?;<> Jeff Wu: Ha, he's my de facto dad. Jeff Wu: My mom's older brother. He took me in after my parents died. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Sorry. I shouldn't have asked. Jeff Wu: Don't worry. It's all history. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jeff Wu: OK, I'm off work. Boyfriend's waiting.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內) >> Quentin Qiu: Go. Have a nice therapy session. Jeff Wu: Haha... Jeff Wu: Keep up the good work, guys. Cathy Hsieh: Bye, Jeff.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外返回) >>;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好掰掰) >>;<> Quentin Qiu: Good for him. We have hours ahead of us. Cathy Hsieh: Not Tyler.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好掰掰返回) >> Quentin Qiu: Ah, right. Lucky boy, aren't you?;<< Play (邱奕宏, MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回) >>;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好左看) >> Tyler Cao: I'm busy with work, okay? Quentin Qiu: Am I involved? Tyler Cao: No. Quentin Qiu: Good. I'm off to take a dump, then. Cathy Hsieh: Ewww. We didn't need to know. <> Tyler Cao: Get lost already. Cathy Hsieh: ...;<< PlayUntil (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好左看返回) >> Cathy Hsieh: *Sigh*;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好低頭) >> Tyler Cao: What's up? Cathy Hsieh: Nothing. I just wonder why this is happening. Tyler Cao: Didn't you chalk it up to software glitch? Ops couldn't fix it. Cathy Hsieh: ...Yeah, I guess you're right.;<< PlayUntil (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好低頭返回) >> Cathy Hsieh: I'm off to get coffee. See you guys around.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好掰掰) >> Tyler Cao: Bye.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側身站好掰掰返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Tyler Cao: Hey, Jason.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外) >> Tyler Cao: I see you're officially off work. Could you do me a favor, if you don't mind?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看轉左) >> Tyler Cao: There's something I need help with. Tyler Cao: No stress. You could say no.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外返回) >> <<#End>>

title: 蕭勇明擋住簽約走廊
body:
//電梯打開三四個人衝去簽約走廊，其中一人是醫護人員，其中一人是郭悅美
//蕭勇明正站擋在簽約走廊門前，門前有些裝置投影封鎖線



Michael Hsiao: I heard it, Mr. Dai!;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_正站守門右看)>>
Michael Hsiao: You took down an armed psychopath, barehanded! Incredible!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
<<#Simple(12)>>
->It's nothing.
    Michael Hsiao: Don't be modest. Nobody could do that!
->What are you doing here?
    //
->Is Lawrence Chang OK?
    Michael Hsiao: Ah, you mean that injured man?;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_正站守門右看抬頭)>>
    Michael Hsiao: I'm not sure. We only just arrived...
    Michael Hsiao: But since the medics are here, I trust he will be alright?;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_正站守門右看抬頭返回)>>
    Thought: ...But the injury looked bad.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: We are setting public barriers around the crime scene. The police will be here soon.
Michael Hsiao: There's only so much we can do as security officers.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Can I go in?
    Michael Hsiao: Sorry, I was instructed to keep everyone outside.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->OK. I see.
        //
    ->Meaning I can leave now?
        <<#GoTo(@問蕭勇明打完人以後的法律責任)>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Meaning I can leave now?
    <<@問蕭勇明打完人以後的法律責任>>
    Michael Hsiao: Hmm? I don't understand.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->When the police arrive, should I be here?
    ->I knocked him out, after all.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Michael Hsiao: Ah, that. Don't worry about it.
    Michael Hsiao: You're free to go, since Silencio didn't say otherwise.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Great.
        //
    ->What does Silencio have to do with it?
        Michael Hsiao: Let me explain.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_正站守門右看抬手)>>
        Michael Hsiao: Silencio has analyzed the entire incident, weighed legal responsibilities, and made necessary reports.
        Michael Hsiao: We only have to follow its instructions.
        Michael Hsiao: The reports did say you're free to go. We didn't stop you at the elevator, did we?;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_正站守門右看抬手返回)>>
        Thought: I didn't know about that...
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: Ah, enough dillydally, or else the head officer will catch me.
Michael Hsiao: See you later, Mr. Dai.
<<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_正站守門右看返回)>>
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 進面談大廳遇到何歆翊2
body:
Wayne Zheng: ...
Wayne Zheng: ...
Wayne Zheng: ...

    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Wayne?
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Wayne Zheng: ...

        <<#EndSimple>>

title: 問采欣問題
body:
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Hello.
    <<#GoTo(@開始跟采欣說一些話)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>


<<@開始跟采欣說一些話>>

//if第一次說話
<<#If($FirstAskTsaiShin=-1)>>
    <<Set($FirstAskTsaiShin,0)>>
    Cathy Hsieh: ...
    Thought: She didn't hear me...?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Hello?
    ->I will, uh, leave you be?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Cathy Hsieh: Eh!?
    Cathy Hsieh: Ah, um...!?
    Cathy Hsieh: Hi! Hello!
    Cathy Hsieh: Sorry I didn't hear you. Was too focused.
<<#EndIf>>



Cathy Hsieh: Can I help you?
<<@第一次認識采欣問答循環>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What do you do here? ($AskTsaiShinWhatDoesSheDo)
    <<Set($AskTsaiShinWhatDoesSheDo,-1)>>
    Cathy Hsieh: I'm an engineer.
    Cathy Hsieh: Um...
    Cathy Hsieh: I take care of software feature requests and service tickets from Screening.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->I don't understand.
        Cathy Hsieh: You don't?
        Cathy Hsieh: Ugh...
        Cathy Hsieh: Um...
        Cathy Hsieh: Hmmm...?
        Quentin Qiu: Haha, give Cathy a break.
        Quentin Qiu: She's not very good at explaining things.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->I see. Sorry.
            Cathy Hsieh: D-don't be!
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Cathy Hsieh: Ha, haha...
    ->Roger.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Cathy Hsieh: Anything else I can help you with?
    <<#GoTo(@第一次認識采欣問答循環)>>
->What do you think of this job? ($AskTsaiShinHowWorkHere)
    <<Set($AskTsaiShinHowWorkHere,-1)>>
    Cathy Hsieh: ...About this job, huh?
    Cathy Hsieh: Hard to say...
    Cathy Hsieh: The pay is meh...
    Cathy Hsieh: Long work hours...
    Cathy Hsieh: Get called back to work while I'm off work, all the time...
    Thought: That sounds terrible...
    Cathy Hsieh: But everyone here is nice!
    Cathy Hsieh: Wayne tries to reduce my workload, telling me to offload to others.
    Quentin Qiu: But you can't. You have to take care of everything, no?
    Tyler Cao: Right. Cathy can't trust people with her work.
    Cathy Hsieh: I'm not like that!
    Cathy Hsieh: Ahem!
    Cathy Hsieh: Anyhow, that is it.
    Cathy Hsieh: Don't mind me, Mr. Dai.
    Cathy Hsieh: Every person is different, and you have different responsibilities. My opinion doesn't apply!
